name: Yang2020 HQ
subject: #AskAndrew a question so he can answer it on Friday!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
Check out some Andrew’s most powerful moments from the debate last night and make sure to #AskAndrew a question by Friday.

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=1715%2E377263%2EJO6QtC) Yang Gang --

Did you see Andrew knock it out of the park at the Democratic debate last night in Ohio?

He had every candidate talking about automation and UBI.

In case you missed it, we put together some of Andrew's best moments from the debate. **Take a look and then share with your friends and family. It’s the best way to spread our Humanity First message with more Americans.** | | **Andrew Yang** @AndrewYang

name: Jay Inslee
subject: Not a single question about climate change. Not a single question about climate change. Not a single question about climate change.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
I'm not just disappointed, I'm angry.
| [](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/7135?t=3&akid=7972%2E868730%2EF4Pn1H) Friend, Three hours. Dozens of questions. **But not one single question about the climate crisis.** Last night, CNN, _The New York Times_ , and the DNC failed us. They failed the American people, and they failed the young leaders striking and demanding action. I won't stand for it. And you shouldn't either. **It's up to us to hold candidates, the Party, and the media accountable right here right now-- and I'll use my megaphone to do just that. But if I don't win this re-election, I'll lose that megaphone and my position as a national leader on climate.** [**We need to fight back and be vocal right now. If you want to make sure climate stays part of the national discussion, donate to my re-election campaign today. Every donation makes a difference. Donate $1 or more right now.**](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/7135?t=4&akid=7972%2E868730%2EF4Pn1H) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$1 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/7136?t=5&akid=7972%2E868730%2EF4Pn1H)
---
| | [$10 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/7137?t=6&akid=7972%2E868730%2EF4Pn1H)
---
| [$25 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/7138?t=7&akid=7972%2E868730%2EF4Pn1H)
---
| | [$50 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/7139?t=8&akid=7972%2E868730%2EF4Pn1H)
---
| [$100 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/7140?t=9&akid=7972%2E868730%2EF4Pn1H)
---
| | [OTHER →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/7141?t=10&akid=7972%2E868730%2EF4Pn1H)
---
It is unbelievable that last night the moderators had time to ask about _Ellen_ but not about our climate and our future.
When DNC Chair Tom Perez refused our call for a climate debate, he said: "Beginning in 2017, I made clear to our media partners that the issue of climate change must be featured prominently in our debates. That didn't happen in 2016 -- and it was wrong." **Well, guess what, when it comes to the most critical issues facing all Americans -- last night's debate failed us.**
The climate crisis is a foreign policy issue. It's an economic issue. It's a justice and equality issue. It's a women's issue. It's a health care issue. **It's THE issue, because it's the existential crisis of our time.**
That's why I can't for the life of me understand why the moderators did not ask even one question about it. And I'm not just disappointed -- I'm angry.
If we don't show our strength, if we don't show we're united in anger about last night's "debate," I can't promise that these presidential debates will get any better or show any more interest in saving millions of lives and our planet. But I can promise that I will hold the Party, the press, and the future Democratic nominee accountable, whoever she or he may be.
[**A donation right now before our mid-month deadline sends a message to the Party, to the media, and to the 2020 nominees that climate deserves everything we've got -- donate $1 or more right now.**](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/7135?t=11&akid=7972%2E868730%2EF4Pn1H)
Very truly yours,
Jay
[CONTRIBUTE!](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/7135?t=12&akid=7972%2E868730%2EF4Pn1H)
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](http://act.jayinslee.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=13&akid=7972%2E868730%2EF4Pn1H). Contributions or gifts to JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D) are not tax deductible. | PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
PO BOX 21067 SEATTLE, WA 98111

name: Cory Booker
subject: Rugged individualism
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
I want to repeat something I said in my closing answer from last night, because I truly believe this: When we talk about the big things America has achieved, people often chalk it up to rugged individ
| | |
---
| Friend, Before I go to bed tonight, I want to say thank you. In the past 24 hours, we've seen an incredible influx of support for our message of bringing people together. I want to repeat something I said in my closing answer from last night, because I truly believe this: When we talk about the big things America has achieved, people often chalk it up to rugged individualism -- but that's not what got us to the moon, it didn't beat the Nazis, it didn't map the human genome, it didn't beat Jim Crow. Everything big that we've done in this country has been the result of people coming together to recognize our common purpose. This election is no different. And a year from now, when I'm standing on stage ready to debate Donald Trump, I'll beat him because I'll have a grassroots army of people who know that true patriotism is loving all of the people that make up this country. [**If that 's something you can picture like I can, then make a donation to this campaign right now and let's make that vision a reality.**](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-october?refcode=em_fr_20191016_CB_20191016-fr-CB-RI-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Thanks,
Cory [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-october?refcode=em_fr_20191016_CB_20191016-fr-CB-RI-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

This campaign is moving quickly. name: Steve Chabot
subject: A Reason to Celebrate
body:
A win for the pro-life mission! No Images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jdirithd-kujkulhluu-z/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdirithd-kujkulhluu-r/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdirithd-kujkulhluu-y/)
### [A Reason to Celebrate](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdirithd-kujkulhluu-j/)
I recently spoke to a gathering of pro-life constituents on our shared commitment to protect innocent unborn lives. Calling it a "Thanksgiving Vigil," we were gathered to reflect and celebrate advancement in our pro-life mission. In this week's blog, I discuss the reason why we were celebrating and how this news is another accomplishment in our battle to protect those who are the most vulnerable. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdirithd-kujkulhluu-t/)
# Previous Blog Posts
[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdirithd-kujkulhluu-i/)
### [Impeachment and the Economy](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdirithd-kujkulhluu-d/)
Back in 1992, Bill Clinton's campaign manager, James Carville, successfully used the slogan "it's the economy, stupid" to defeat George H.W. Bush for the presidency. So how is the economy looking this election cycle, and what impact will that have on President Trump's bid for winning a second term? [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdirithd-kujkulhluu-h/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdirithd-kujkulhluu-k/)
### [Will Impeachment Sink a Critical Trade Deal?](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdirithd-kujkulhluu-u/)
The Democrats are creating a political firestorm with their false impeachment inquiry against President Trump. Meanwhile, important issues are being ignored. In this week's blog, I discuss these issues that have more effect on our lives than this latest attempt to remove the President from office. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdirithd-kujkulhluu-o/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdirithd-kujkulhluu-b/)
### [A Very Dangerous Situation](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdirithd-kujkulhluu-n/)
The recent Iranian missile attack on Saudi Arabia's largest oil facility is a major escalation in danger on the world scene. President Trump's critics, stretching back to before the 2016 election, claimed when such an event occurs, Trump would be rash and irresponsible. In this week's blog, I write how I think the President is handling this latest act of aggression. Were his critics right? [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdirithd-kujkulhluu-p/) [Donate](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdirithd-kujkulhluu-x/) [Get a Yard Sign](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdirithd-kujkulhluu-m/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdirithd-kujkulhluu-c/) | [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdirithd-kujkulhluu-q/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdirithd-kujkulhluu-a/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdirithd-kujkulhluu-f/)

name: Dick Durbin
subject: Need you on the team, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
#
Peter,
As Mitch McConnell and President Trump use the Senate to enact the extreme GOP agenda, it has never been more clear that we need to take back the Senate in 2020. If we don't, even a Democratic President will face McConnell obstruction.
The path to Democrats winning back the Senate in 2020 runs right through Illinois, which is why it's essential we keep this campaign on track. That's why I'm setting an ambitious fundraising goal--and I need your help to get there, Peter.
**[Will you contribute $5 right now to help me meet my fundraising goal?](https://action.dickdurbin.%3D%3D/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-oct-2019-goal?refcode=em191016&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
Democrats have a vision to move this country forward and repair the damage caused by President Trump's awful policies--but it's going to take all of us standing together to fight back and win both the White House and the Senate in the next election.
We can't do this without you, Peter. That's why I need you.
**[If you're with me in the fight to take back the Senate, I need your help now. Pitch in $5 to help my campaign meet this important fundraising goal.](https://action.dickdurbin.%3D%3D/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-oct-2019-goal?refcode=em191016&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
My best,
Dick Durbin
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://action.dickdurbin.%3D%3D/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-oct-2019-goal?refcode=em191016&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

name: Joe Sestak
subject: 51 miles into my walk across New Hampshire
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Joe Sestak for President
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/75695/images/ADM_JOE_LOGO.png]

[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/75695/images/sestak-walking-cropped.jpg][https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/75695/images/shoesign_blue%20without%20disclaimer.png]

Yesterday was day 4 of my walk across the Granite State — walking in the shoes of New Hampshirites.

My walk began from Peterborough and ended in Mont Vernon, with some idyllic scenery along the way!

[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/75695/images/Walk%20Day%204ema.png]

In the morning I took a quick detour to Derry New Hampshire to meet with the local chamber of commerce. Derry is nicknamed "Spacetown" as it is the birthplace of Alan Shepard, a fellow US Naval Academy graduate, former Rear Admiral & first American in space. So the conversation with the Chamber of Commerce focused on jobs of the future!

[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/75695/images/Walk%20Day%204emb.png]

Next, I returned to the walk. Along the path down mountain road I had several media interviews - including a walk-along with the Guardian - and a few visits with the incredible people of New Hampshire. First, I stopped by Plowshare Farm, which helps those with disabilities share joy, work, and meaningful lives in a caring community. Second, I got some delicious, locally famous brittle from Maple Lane Farm in Lyndeborough, which I highly recommend!

[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/75695/images/EHBmRyxXkAEpupP.jpeg]

I then stuck a stake in the ground and drove to speak to local Democrats in New Boston and in Bow, before driving back to walk until late at night in a nor'easter. I finished up around midnight!

[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/75695/images/IMG_2580.jpg]

I’m now kicking off day 5, where I’ll be traveling from Mont Vernon to Manchester. For my schedule for the day, please check out our events page ( here [https://www.facebook.com/pg/joesestak/videos/?ref=page_internal] ).

[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/75695/images/shoesign_blue%20without%20disclaimer.png]

Paid for by Joe Sestak for President.

Joe Sestak

clean_body: [] [] Yesterday was day 4 of my walk across the Granite State — walking in the shoes of New Hampshirites. My walk began from Peterborough and ended in Mont Vernon, with some idyllic scenery along the way! [] In the morning I took a quick detour to Derry New Hampshire to meet with the local chamber of commerce. Derry is nicknamed "Spacetown" as it is the birthplace of Alan Shepard, a fellow US Naval Academy graduate, former Rear Admiral & first American in space. So the conversation with the Chamber of Commerce focused on jobs of the future! [] Next, I returned to the walk. Along the path down mountain road I had several media interviews - including a walk-along with the Guardian - and a few visits with the incredible people of New Hampshire. First, I stopped by Plowshare Farm, which helps those with disabilities share joy, work, and meaningful lives in a caring community. Second, I got some delicious, locally famous brittle from Maple Lane Farm in Lyndeborough, which I highly recommend! [] I then stuck a stake in the ground and drove to speak to local Democrats in New Boston and in Bow, before driving back to walk until late at night in a nor'easter. I finished up around midnight! [] I’m now kicking off day 5, where I’ll be traveling from Mont Vernon to Manchester. For my schedule for the day, please check out our events page ( here [] ). [] Paid for by Joe Sestak for President. Joe Sestak P.O Box 17246 Alexandria, VA 22302 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe:

name: Nina Ahmad
subject: We’re Backing Nina for Auditor General
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nina for PA
body:
My name is Councilwoman Cindy Bass and I'm proud to be joined by progressive voices all over Pennsylvania in supporting this amazing woman Nina Ahmad [(CLICK HERE)](https://act.myngp.com/el/UZpKuXd6gtDXK0yATaHW-6K4baGpmCIGWhwjIsRANWU=/8dlTTiq7DesPQxkIHRp_tVY_awJRVB7X8KwctDJq9Jg=)

Nina led the charge in exposing sexual harassment and holding leaders accountable. I admire her fearlessness, her advocacy and I think it's high time to elect a progressive woman to statewide office. I'm proud to stand by her side.

Nina is not your typical candidate. She holds a Ph.D. in Chemistry from the University of Pennsylvania, came to the United States impoverished and alone in her early twenties following a deadly war in her home country of Bangladesh. Her mother had to actually dress her as a boy to avoid enemy soldiers who were using rape as a weapon. She saw first-hand the devastation caused by automatic assault rifles.

She's passionate about protecting our families from gun violence and with your help we can send a message to Harrisburg that we're passionate about stopping gun violence too [[CLICK HERE TO HELP NINA]](https://act.myngp.com/el/UZpKuXd6gtDXK0yATaHW-6K4baGpmCIGWhwjIsRANWU=/jn94lRCRnz5GVNrvvLWtzzqZOMMsLvamOWuOCp71qkA=)

My name is State Senator Art Haywood and I'm also proud to stand with Nina. Nina's compelling life story and demonstrated commitment to progressive values makes her the clear choice in my mind to be the next Auditor General of Pennsylvania.

If we want new faces in government, then we need a new progressive voice!

Please [CLICK HERE](https://act.myngp.com/el/UZpKuXd6gtDXK0yATaHW-6K4baGpmCIGWhwjIsRANWU=/8dlTTiq7DesPQxkIHRp_tVY_awJRVB7X8KwctDJq9Jg=) to learn more! In 2018 we played a pivotal role in flipping the US House of Representatives by electing 9 Democratic scientists to the House and Senate as well as over 100 to key legislative districts while raising over $5.2 million with an average donation of just $27.55. https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=i.GwjGImjV6OuRU&b=r9bNg2R1KMj7S7f1663zqw

Hi Peter

I always knew Darren Soto was bad, but when the Conservative Review Liberty Scorecards came out, we found out just how bad....

Darren Soto got 17% for the last Congress- an "F" rating.

His score is nearly identical to Speaker Pelosi, because Soto is Nancy Pelosi's lap dog - he sold his voting card to her a long time ago!

What really upsets me is that Soto's Democrats are all-in on impeaching the President. They have become SO radicalized, they support impeaching the President for political payback.

Time for that to stop!

Me, I’m not a career politician. I don't have a fancy family pedigree.

I earned my education in the Cold War frontiers of Germany and South Korea, as well as the battlefields of Kuwait, Iraq, and Afghanistan. That's why I'm 100% behind the President's "America First" policies!

I’m running to fight for American greatness, American peace, and American pride.

I am a Christian conservative. I believe that when you swear an oath to defend the Constitution, that oath has no expiration date!

Impeachment was never supposed to be a method of resolving our political disputes. It's supposed to be a rare way to remove a President who has committed high crimes.

President Trump is innocent! And he is a great President and a great American. We must defend him and re-elect him!

Perhaps you agree with me, that we need more Bible, more Constitution- and less crazy liberal Democrats like Darren Soto.

If so, then I need your help!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=i.GwjGImjV6OuRU&b=r9bNg2R1KMj7S7f1663zqw

Can you help me?

to let the people of Central Florida know about Soto's liberal record.

Can I count on you for a donation

The Democrats are going to lose next year- but only if we let the American people know what they have done. It's up to us!

Let's get this done!

name: Betsy Rader
subject: Did you miss my e-mail?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Betsy Rader
body:
Hi Peter,

I just wanted to forward an e-mail I sent recently in case you didn't get a chance to read through it. Last week I announced that I am running in 2020 for an open state senate seat in Northeast Ohio. I'm forwarding you this e-mail that describes why this seat is so important to getting rid of gerrymandering in Ohio. 2020 is going to be a critical year, as we saw Tuesday night during the debate, and I hope I can count on your support. We can do this!

Talk soon,

Betsy

| |
---
**Why I 'm Running Again** Dear Peter, We have to fight the extreme partisan gerrymandering that has stolen the voices of Ohio voters. The Ohio legislature doesn't prioritize issues that help regular people - quality education, affordable health care, good-paying jobs, a clean environment. That's because lobbyists and wealthy special interests have taken over Columbus. They donate millions to campaigns and PACs, and the Republicans they helped to elect have drawn unfair districts in order to stay in power. Lobbyists and big money win. _The people of Ohio lose._ That's why I'm running for the Ohio State Senate in 2020. After the census in 2021, we have the vital opportunity to take our democracy back in Ohio by re-drawing our districts and getting rid of gerrymandering. Under new Ohio laws, every seat we can flip in the state legislature next year will give us more of a say in how our congressional and state districts are drawn for the next ten years. This matters not just to the future of Ohio but to the future of our country. Ohio has always been a bellwether state for national elections and we need it to stay competitive. [](https://act.myngp.com/el/uI5epIN5xTN9WpUMw_xQTc9BkUc0tL28tazD-tJ2iDg=/9-S_STsvVZ_r0LegrHyi0TojfQkmcXTd5wnug5jaJ5Q=) The current Republican in Senate District 18 (where I am running) isn't running again due to term limits, and already the primary is attracting far-right Republicans. The district is one of the most competitive in Ohio, and one we can win..._i_ _n_ a fair fight. That's why I need you. The current Republican incumbent received over $2 million dollars in contributions during the last two elections! We can't let them drown out our message in 2020 when it's an open seat. Now is the time when we must turn Ohio around and make it a critical swing state again. Please visit my website at www.betsyrader4ohio.com, join our team of volunteers, and like and share our posts on Facebook, Instagram and Twitter. And please donate what you can to help us run a strong, competitive race! Together, we can give the people of Ohio a voice again and show the country what democracy looks like. Thanks for your support, [](https://act.myngp.com/el/uI5epIN5xTN9WpUMw_xQTc9BkUc0tL28tazD-tJ2iDg=/9-S_STsvVZ_r0LegrHyi0TojfQkmcXTd5wnug5jaJ5Q=)
# [www.BetsyRader4Ohio.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/uI5epIN5xTN9WpUMw_xQTc9BkUc0tL28tazD-tJ2iDg=/i5gK44ACASSMZx38knlqtOOpNiNRtNLne977ka2bNcc=)

---
| Paid for by Friends of Betsy Rader
---
Friends of Betsy Rader
PO Box 280
Novelty OH 44072 United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/uI5epIN5xTN9WpUMw_xQTc9BkUc0tL28tazD-tJ2iDg=/Voqy76SE4vF9jX2qN9Jt7_0SScHe4xwXHXznLD8DaTY=).

name: Michael Bennet
subject: one question
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
this is what our whole campaign should be about | |
---
| Friend, at my Iowa town hall I got a chance to hear from caucusgoers about real problems they face.

[One question really stuck with me:](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaec4/134673f2/af77791/6997e199/1743554608/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/teambfa?refcode=EM_FR_B1_101719_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000") A community leader asked what I'd do about the people who live on the edge of the middle-class, where one unexpected bill or expense could throw them into financial chaos.

This question is what our whole campaign should be about: building opportunity to ensure that hardworking families can live good middle-class lives, free from fear of surprise bills sending them into debt.

[Here's one of my solutions:](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaec4/134673f2/af77791/6997e199/1743554608/VEsE/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/teambfa?refcode=EM_FR_B1_101719_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000") By increasing the Earned Income Tax Credit and the Child Tax Credit, we can reduce childhood poverty by 40% and put more money in the hands of hardworking people -- instead of giving more tax cuts to the wealthiest Americans.

[**Donate any amount today to ensure every undecided voter hears my message and help me keep sharing my vision, voter by voter, state by state. Can I count on you? >>**](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaec4/134673f2/af77791/6997e199/1743554608/VEsF/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/teambfa?refcode=EM_FR_B1_101719_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

While I was talking to Iowans about the issues they face and the solutions we can create to solve them, some of the 2020 primary field was sparring over banning Trump from Twitter on the debate stage.

We don't win in 2020 by playing into the media circus.

[We win in 2020 by providing real solutions to fix this country's greatest challenges and by focusing our campaign on the issues that matter.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaec4/134673f2/af77791/6997e199/1743554608/VEsP/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/teambfa?refcode=EM_FR_B1_101719_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

As a senator from a purple state, I've never known an easy election.

[But I've won every time I've been on the ballot by making my campaigns about real issues that working families care about.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaec4/134673f2/af77791/6997e199/1743554608/VEsHBQ/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/teambfa?refcode=EM_FR_B1_101719_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

[**We 're going to win by having real conversations with the American people. Will you to chip in to our movement?**](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaec4/134673f2/af77791/6997e199/1743554608/VEsHBA/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/teambfa?refcode=EM_FR_B1_101719_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

name: =?utf-8?Q?Chairman=20Kyle=20Hupfer?=
subject: Save the Date: 2020 Congress of Counties
body:
2020 is just around the corner. And we're excited to officially announce the first big political event of 2020 to kick-off your election year... | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/save-the-date-2020-congress-of-counties?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| | [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=1c29ab6da0&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| Dear Hoosier Republican,
2020 is just around the corner. And to kick off your election year, we're excited to officially announce Indiana’s first big political event of 2020 – Congress of Counties 2020!
**Save the date in your calendar now:
_January 31 – February 1, 2020_ _!_**
The big event will be at the Crowne Plaza Hotel Union Station in downtown Indianapolis.

_Congress of Counties is a two-day training event for Indiana's Republican party leaders, candidates and grassroots activists. We’ll hold breakout sessions on topics you’ll want to learn about going into the 2020 elections, along with exciting opportunities to hear from our party’s top Hoosier leaders._

Registration will open soon (keep an eye on your inbox), but the room block at the Crowne Plaza Hotel in downtown Indianapolis is open now! To reserve your room at a special rate of $159, call the Crowne Plaza directly at (317) 631-2221 and mention “Congress of Counties.”

Hope to see you next year!

\- Kyle Hupfer
Chairman, Indiana Republican Party
---
| | | | | | | [](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=6a88bb5f05&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| | [](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=732d8f0b0a&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| | [](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=4312ba059d&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
|

name: Addisu Demissie
subject: This is our next president, folks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| For the fourth consecutive debate, Cory walked off the stage as a winner. It may have been crowded on that stage (11 other candidates can do that!) but that wasn't enough to stop Cory from standing out as a leader and a unifier. **[If you like what you heard from Cory during the debate, chip in here so we can keep sharing Cory's message with voters around the country.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-october?refcode=em_fr_20191017_AD_20191017-fr-AD-debatehits-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** **Here are some of Cory 's greatest hits from debate night:** **1\. Unity over division.** Cory kicked off the debate by talking about how we need to unite our country and start the healing process after years of division -- even as we move forward with the impeachment process: _**" We are talking about ongoing proceedings to remove a sitting president from office. This has got to be about patriotism and not partisanship... We we have to conduct this process in a way that is honorable, that brings our country together, doesn't rip us apart."**_ **2\. We can 't let Republican talking points be our talking points.** Cory came to Joe Biden's defense when he was asked about Donald Trump's false claims during the debate: _**" We are literally using Donald Trump's lies and the second issue we cover on this stage is elevating a lie and attacking a statesman -- that was so offensive."**_ **3\. Reproductive health care isn 't just a women's issue.** Then, he refocused the debate on issues that haven't received enough attention such as child poverty, strengthening unions, and reproductive health carecare. One line that really stood out was when he called upon men specifically to step up and get engaged in the battle for reproductive rights: _**" Women should not be the only ones taking up this cause and this fight."**_ **4\. What a leader on gun violence prevention sounds like.** Later in the debate, Cory was asked about his plan to address gun violence. As president, he'd take bold action to stop gun violence and enact progressive gun law reform. This issue is personal for Cory: _**" I'm living with a sense of urgency on this problem because when I go home to my community like millions of Americans who live in communities where these weapons, where these gunshots, are real every single day."**_ **5\. The closing is what they remember.** And how about that closing? _**" This election is not a referendum on one guy in one office. It's a referendum on who we are and who we must be to each other. The next leader is going to have to be one amongst us Democrats that can unite us all."**_ **[Did Cory make you proud on that stage? If so, donate here so we can keep up the momentum and continue growing our campaign.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-october?refcode=em_fr_20191017_AD_20191017-fr-AD-debatehits-actives_actives_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** I'll leave you with my favorite line from Cory last night: _**" We've got one shot to make Donald Trump a one-term president."**_ Cory is the person to make that happen, folks. Addisu Addisu Demissie
Campaign Manager
Cory 2020 [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-october?refcode=em_fr_20191017_AD_20191017-fr-AD-debatehits-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
---
| | Paid for by Cory 2020
---

P.O. Box 32009 Newark, NJ 07102 | All content (C) 2019 Cory 2020, All Rights Reserved.
Contributions or gifts to Cory 2020 are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, [you can add your name now to get email updates directly from Cory 2020.](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0a27/5fca0d19/776fda0f/291ff960/2725443452/VEsC/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter")
This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0a27/5fca0d19/776fda0f/291ff96f/2725443452/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0a27/5fca0d19/776fda0f/291ff96e/2725443452/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0a27/5fca0d19/776fda0f/291ff96d/2725443452/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0a27/5fca0d19/776fda0f/291ff96c/2725443452/VEsO/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0a27/5fca0d19/776fda0f/291ff960/2725443452/VEsP/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter").

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Schiff Pushed Volker to Say Ukraine Felt Pressure from Trump
body:
"In a secret interview, Rep. Adam Schiff, leader of the House Democratic effort to impeach President Trump, pressed former..." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f8efba835c&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Schiff Pushed Volker to Say Ukraine Felt Pressure from Trump**

“In a secret interview, Rep. Adam Schiff, leader of the House Democratic effort to impeach President Trump, pressed former United States special representative to Ukraine Kurt Volker to testify that Ukrainian officials felt pressured to investigate former Vice President Joe Biden's son Hunter as a result of Trump withholding U.S. military aid to Ukraine,” Byron York writes in the _Washington Examiner_.

The former Ambassador, however, flat-out denied Schiff’s version of events. “When Volker repeatedly declined to agree to Schiff's characterization of events, Schiff said, ‘Ambassador, you're making this much more complicated than it has to be.’”

It’s becoming clear why Schiff is trying to hide his proceedings behind closed doors.

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=693f23429e&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “Ivanka Trump’s goal to boost women entrepreneurs in the developing world with an international $2.6 billion fund is taking root,” Paul Bedard writes in the [_**Washington Examiner**_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=bfd71b8f85&e=3ee4985eea). “Two years after kicking off the Women’s Entrepreneurs Finance Initiative through the World Bank, [Ms.] Trump on Friday plans to herald its successes.”
---
|
---
| “The clear benefits of the USMCA have fueled a growing chorus of support for the agreement — from farmers and ranchers to manufacturers, small business leaders to our largest employers, voters of all political persuasions, and, yes, Democrats and Republicans alike,” former Reps. Rick Boucher (D-VA) and Tom Davis (R-VA) write in the [_Richmond Times-Dispatch_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=838a676154&e=3ee4985eea). “We see a nation competing confidently around the globe.”
---
|
---
| “President Donald Trump campaigned on a very specific foreign policy. ‘America First’ has its roots in the less-interventionist policies of our Founding Fathers,” Sen. Rand Paul (R-KY) writes in [_USA Today_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=83271a876a&e=3ee4985eea). “Then-candidate Trump said often that the Iraq War was a mistake, and that we were in too many places for too long. Fast-forward to 2019, and the president is now moving forward to stop the ‘endless wars.’ I stand with him.”
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f79e242615&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=33f0fdc381&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=9036ebb663)
---

name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: This is how we make history:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
Off The Sidelines

**********

Peter, this is urgent:

Trump’s former campaign manager Corey Lewandowski just announced he’s running against my friend Jeanne Shaheen for her Senate seat in New Hampshire.

If we want to return the Senate to Democratic control next November, we cannot afford to let Jeanne lose her seat. And we definitely can’t hand it over to one of Trump’s handpicked cronies.

Make an urgent donation right now, and we’ll split your gift between Jeanne Shaheen’s re-election campaign and Off the Sidelines. You can ensure Jeanne defeats Lewandowski by helping her build the strongest possible campaign to weather his attacks.

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ots_shaheen?refcode=20190926_D_&amounts=25%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000

During the 2016 campaign, Lewandowski served as Trump’s attack dog. Since then, he’s been selling White House access to the highest bidders via a shadowy lobbying firm—cozying up to predatory payday lenders, the fossil fuel industry, and foreign actors.

He’s the worst of the worst. And Trump is egging him on because he’d LOVE to have one of his cronies representing New Hampshire in the Senate.

We won’t let that happen. Jeanne has been a champion for her state her entire time in office—taking on bold fights like reauthorizing the Violence Against Women Act and guaranteeing women’s equal pay.

She’s been a valuable partner to me in the fight to end sexual assault in the military, and we’ve worked together to improve the lives of all American families by making childcare more affordable and banning harmful chemicals that can contaminate our drinking water.

I’m going to do everything I can to make sure Jeanne holds her seat, and that she defeats Corey Lewandowski.

We MUST re-elect Jeanne if we want to have any shot of taking back the Senate next year. Trump lost New Hampshire by just half a percentage point in 2016—this is far from a safe seat or an easy race, so we have to give it all we’ve got.

Split a donation between Jeanne’s re-election campaign and Off the Sidelines today:

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ots_shaheen?refcode=20190926_D_&amounts=25%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000

With so much gratitude,

Kirsten

**********

Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate

Contributions or gifts to Off the Sidelines PAC are not tax-deductible. Off the Sidelines PAC does not accept contributions from federal lobbyists, corporate and/or trade association PACs, or "for profit" business entities, including but not limited to sole proprietorships, partnerships, and LLCs.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We'd hate to see you go, but if you want to stop receiving messages from Kirsten altogether, click here to unsubscribe: https://www.pages05.net/gfppcinc/unsubscribe/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=22276113&spUserID=NTcyMjY0MzQ5NDY4S0&spJobID=MTYwMTA1Mjk2NQS2&spReportId=MTYwMTA1Mjk2NQS2.

name: Team Beto
subject: Transparency
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
body:
[1]Beto for America

Our campaign prides itself on being transparent. Like we livestream our
team meetings, road trips, dentist appointments, and answer questions from
anybody with a phone kind of transparent.

That’s why when we announced that our campaign needs to raise $2 million
in the next couple of weeks to put Beto on a winning path, we shared with
you the exact breakdown of where the money goes.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/39094?refcode=ema20191017-61900&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=61900%2E444211%2Es95hgB ]Beto Graph 1

So when we saw this graph about our fundraising progress slowing down we
wanted to be transparent about this too.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/39094?refcode=ema20191017-61900&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=61900%2E444211%2Es95hgB ]Beto Graph 2

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/39094?refcode=ema20191017-61900&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=61900%2E444211%2Es95hgB ]So we really hope you believe us when we say we need our grassroots
supporters to step up, help us pick up the pace, and get back on track to
reaching out critical $2 million goal.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/39094?refcode=ema20191017-61900&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=61900%2E444211%2Es95hgB ]Contribute $3

We don’t accept a single cent from PAC’s or special interests groups.

This campaign and our movement is funded 100% by you. It’s not an easy
choice, but it’s the right choice if we want to put power back into the
hands of the people.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/39094?refcode=ema20191017-61900&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=61900%2E444211%2Es95hgB ]There’s more than a million people reading this email: if every single
one gave even just $1 it would mean the world to our campaign. Will you
please chip in whatever you can now?

Counting on you,

Team Beto

Contribute to Beto's campaign: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beto-for-america-emails?refcode=em20191017footer&t=1024&refcode2=61900_444211_s95hgB&akid=61900%2E444211%2Es95hgB

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1025&akid=61900%2E444211%2Es95hgB

P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: Meeting with Nancy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
Wow. What a meltdown. |
---
| | | | | | | | [](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=abbe29c2ada6550e3aa0f3370f833a3d6161ed5c467bb38eb65bb0527c801f593dd57d6b147b2edb214edd21bb5469fbf8208c441473c55c)
---

Friend,

Nancy Pelosi needs help fast!

There is either something wrong with her "upstairs," or she just plain doesn't like our great Country.

**She had a total meltdown during a very important meeting yesterday regarding our great troops. It was very sad to watch and totally uncalled for.**

Nancy is unwilling to work with me and my administration to Keep America Great, and yesterday's incident proves she cares more about politics and IMPEACHING ME than this Nation.

_But, that 's why she's a third-rate politician and the leader of the Do Nothing Democrats. _
---
|
We can't let her get away with this radical behavior. ENOUGH IS ENOUGH! We need **1,000,000 patriots** to send Democrats a very clear message:

name: Jason Yates
subject: The Voting Assistance Center is Live! Check to see if you have an election near you.
body:
| | Hi Peter, Did you know by the end of the year there will have been over 80,000 elections in 2019? This November, 35 of the 50 states that make up the United States have elections taking place! We’ve got everything you need to cast your informed vote in our new [Voting Assistance Center](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iUNGKee3_hgG2DzKC9zCC91AcWR37Aq_zM-Pb8UXzJ18RDXQnLcn6XY3v7CgASEi0A&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191017com01&n=1). **This one-stop shop has all the resources to help you vote.**
* Find out when your state-wide elections are taking place.
* Learn what’s on your ballot.
* Register to vote and check deadlines.
* Locate your polling place.
* View the party platforms.

And so much more! There are 90-million Christians in America, and as many as 72 million _do not_ vote in local elections. We have the opportunity to bring tremendous influence to our communities and states when we bring biblical values to the polls and vote. Peter, check out the [Voting Assistance Center](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iUNGKee3_hgG2DzKC9zCC91AcWR37Aq_zM-Pb8UXzJ18RDXQnLcn6XY3v7CgASEi0A&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191017com01&n=2) for Virginia to find information on upcoming elections in your state and take advantage of these free resources to help you pray think and vote [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iUNGKee3_hgG2DzKC9zCC91AcWR37Aq_zM-Pb8UXzJ18RDXQnLcn6XY3v7CgASEi0A&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191017com01&n=3) Thank you for standing with us and voting in every election! **United. We Stand.** Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191017com01&n=4)
---
* * *
©2019 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191017com01&n=5).
[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6sQ5cX_bEu8cPkWYJ2Mr5-wZKXu3dY5XWtaPM4h3adih&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191017com01&n=6) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=pQzeq3ow3I_GdDaQAo3jThGOsBJSnRMSTnYdqF5RrFw9RIPs8jarlLWzFCwppO5s&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191017com01&n=7) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6hyvAYXBs1PELL28GD73y-k8vVr8cJ4CYXZKhF1mHHVF_9enIccjId0FBdBJJ7Kr&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191017com01&n=8)

Elizabeth wrapped up her fourth debate last night, and made us all proud.

She stayed laser-focused on discussing the problems facing this country and our campaign's vision for big, structural change. Because Elizabeth knows that's how we not only beat Donald Trump in November 2020 -- but also how we level the playing field for working families in January 2021.

**But unfortunately, we fell short of our goal of 7,500 new donors on debate night.**

**This movement is powered by grassroots contributions from people like you reading emails just like this one. And if we're going to build the biggest grassroots movement this country has ever seen, we're going to need your help.**

[**Can you help close the gap and make your first donation today? Every contribution -- $3, $5, $28 or whatever you can give -- helps our movement reach new heights all across the country.**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285280f2/45c30650/10c1fdf21/66f0e126/338406636/VEsHAg/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LW9jdDE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNSzcxRl9ERUJfS0lDX1dfMjAxOTEwMTdfVjFTMV9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-oct19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMK71F_DEB_KIC_W_20191017_V1S1_P")

Because Elizabeth knows that's how we not only beat Donald Trump in November 2020 -- but also how we level the playing field for working families in January 2021. But unfortunately, we fell short of our goal of 7,500 new donors on debate night. This movement is powered by grassroots contributions from people like you reading emails just like this one. And if we're going to build the biggest grassroots movement this country has ever seen, we're going to need your help. "" If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically: | | | | "" | "" | | "" | "" | | "" | "" Thanks for being in this fight, Team Warren "" | | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" ---|---|---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren for President All content (C) 2019 Warren for President, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02117

name: Dan Lipinski
subject: share your experience:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LIPINSKI FOR CONGRESS
body:
I’ve met with countless people in the 3rd district who have been devastated by high prescription drug costs.

From 2012 to 2016, insulin nearly doubled in price. This is just one example of Big Pharma run wild, and it has to stop. That is why I’m supporting the Lower Drug Costs Now Act.

I am fighting for access to affordable healthcare, and that is why I need to hear from you. Share your experience by taking our survey on prescription drugs costs here→ [https://secure.ngpvan.com/FFfjKuC9_Umc4c90wxaC3Q2]

Share your story [https://secure.ngpvan.com/FFfjKuC9_Umc4c90wxaC3Q2]

The Lower Drug Costs Now Act will stop big pharmaceutical companies from ripping off hard-working Americans and help ensure affordable access to life-saving medications. Insulin is only one example — some drugs cost three, four, or even ten times what they would in other countries.

As a Type 1 diabetic myself, I know how important it is that drugs like insulin are affordable for everyone who needs them.
Have you had an experience where your prescription drugs have cost too much? Let me know by taking the survey:
https://secure.ngpvan.com/FFfjKuC9_Umc4c90wxaC3Q2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/FFfjKuC9_Umc4c90wxaC3Q2]

Thank you for sharing your story,
Dan

Dan, an engineer and former teacher, has brought hundreds of millions of dollars in critical infrastructure projects to Illinois, fought for better schools, protections for our seniors, reforms to fix our broken Congress, and sought to make healthcare more affordable for all. We are grateful for your support. Please take a moment to like Dan on Facebook [https://www.facebook.com/danlipinskiforcongress/] or follow Dan on Twitter [https://twitter.com/DanLipinski] . If you’d like to contribute to help Dan keep fighting in Congress, you can click here to support Dan’s reelection now. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dl-general?refcode=footer&amount=20&recurring=auto]

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Trump attacks the environment AGAIN
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hello Peter, The Tongass National Forest in Alaska is one of the most pristine regions of untouched nature in America, filled with salmon creeks, fjords, and glaciers stretching from mountaintops down to the icy waters surrounding Juneau. It's a preserved 16 million acres of unbelievable beauty, so of course Donald Trump wants to tear it apart for profit. Trump announced earlier this week that he was undoing a nearly two decades-long regulation that limits logging in the Tongass National Forest. This is just the latest in a string of environmental regulations unravelled and shredded by Trump and his pro-massive corporation, anti-science, climate change-denying EPA. We need to hear what engaged voters think about this issue: **Should Democrats fight logging in our national forests?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd83/6e9863e8/15850043/1db0faad/843631732/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/wcU8vtB1") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd83/6e9863e8/15850043/1db0faad/843631732/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/wcU8vtB1") Thank you for your response. -The WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd83/6e9863e8/15850043/1db0fab3/843631732/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20191017a.ND-b&refcode2=ipXXH2wJFzMoCRZrANEY")

name: Josh Mahony
subject: Our brother in Baltimore
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MAHONY FOR U
body:
Today, we remember and celebrate the life of a great American hero.

|
---
| Friend,

Today, we remember and celebrate the life of a great American hero.

I would like to pass on my deepest condolences to the family of Representative Elijah E. Cummings.

Congressman Cummings was a shining North Star for many who entered into public service and who dared to fight for a better society and a better world.

Throughout his career, he fought corruption in our government, and in his final months, he fought vigorously to preserve the integrity of our democracy, lower the cost of prescription drugs, and improve life for American families.

Congressman Cummings has left us with a legacy of truth, justice, equality, and equity to aspire to. Let's come together to fulfill his life's work and leave the next generation better off than this one.

Rest in Peace.

-Josh

---
---

PAID FOR BY MAHONY FOR U.S. SENATE

Mahony for Senate
P.O. Box 1884
Fayetteville, AR 72702
United States

This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. To unsubscribe, go to: https://secure.joshuamahony.com/unsubscribe.

name: Lisa Song Sutton
subject: In the news and on the campaign trail
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lisa Song Sutton for Congress
body:
---

Business Leader | Community Advocate | Fresh Perspective | Republican

**Friends,** **THANK YOU so much for your support! Our campaign raised over $100K in our first 90 days! With your help, we have shown that a successful political campaign can be run on positive messaging and hard work. September 30th marked the end of our first quarter in the campaign, and because of you, we finished FIRST in Q3 fundraising of all the Republican candidates!** **We had hundreds of unique donors, from all across the country, show their support. Our average low-dollar, online donation was $58. ** ** ** **Here are a few highlights from my first quarter of the campaign!** We traveled over 2000 miles throughout parts of rural Nevada to visit other areas of the District. My District is the largest in landmass and encompasses 7 counties! We attended the 5th Annual Basque Fry on Saturday, September 14, 2019 at Corley Ranch, Gardnerville, NV where we met constituents from across the state. We participated in school outreach, where I spoke at several high schools and at the College Readiness Bootcamp, hosted at UNLV, about business and entrepreneurship. We also had three fantastic events to support our campaign. I'm incredibly thankful to these generous friends. Thank you so much to Amanda Signorelli for hosting our event at her iconic restaurant, The Golden Steer, Surya and Mandy Gunasekara for opening up your beautiful home to us in Washington, DC, and my friend and early supporter, Joe DeSimone, for hosting a private event at his home. **** **Former Miss Nevada, Daughter Of Immigrant, Launches GOP Congressional Bid**
[**Read More**](https://emailmarketing.amplifyrelations.com/l/MFATQL8yFxY8GlCjRpNJug/ZmHtwe2ZPCctaXMrdz06xQ/Q8892bA9BMZm763IlmsoOULITw) **Former Miss Nevada United States Could Be the First Korean American Congresswoman**
[**Read More**](https://emailmarketing.amplifyrelations.com/l/MFATQL8yFxY8GlCjRpNJug/5fNSyu8961nyoW6rfOxQnA/Q8892bA9BMZm763IlmsoOULITw) **** As we enter into the 4th quarter of 2019, we are continuing to build our campaign. Please continue sharing the website and mentioning that I'm running on any public social media posts! The more shares, the better! Fundraising continues to be critical. I"m running against a well-funded incumbent. Unlike other candidates, I am NOT taking a salary from campaign funds; every dollar helps us conduct the voter outreach required to win this election. Thank you again for all of your support! Let's do this! **[Donate $25

subject: top pick-up opportunity for Democrats

name: Sen. Tom Cotton
subject: The NBA Kowtowing to Chinese Communist Party?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY COTTON FOR SENATE
body:
I wanted to be sure you saw my speech this week calling out the NBA's executives and athletes for their defense of the Chinese Communist Party. GivenI wanted to be sure you saw my speech this week calling out the NBA's executives and athletes for their defense of the Chinese Communist Party. Given LeBron James's recent comments covering for China's shameful actions in Hong Kong, I think that instead of calling him King James, it's probably more accurate to say "Chairman LeBron." | [](http://links.action.supportsenatorcotton.com/u/click?_t=62a450578d3d443d9e24ae604e25bd19&_m=d449d05f82d447d7920823a8eed86831&_e=IC0FXDWctOmvJXvU8d82Xozzj1g7B4iKYlsSCi3XX_alSBRPLr29Rejq8KsLNCwNthJwwFUCmU8WSAeBC0iG1BV3mphjgXcZ52R2EadapO3KFAraFnFz0WhIc1JnF8a2SMALKqaLa70AdGSP2ZaliUh7iMETDXzGOxs-nSB4PXpD-8fKbA75lrN3ejpEGtXzCbu41blCoKxUtofEtM5FM2fVwjMKdXIaCAkIdKHwPmdO-woOYvXAs-EjqVNpBgBmHc8ic3k7UQFnLxx3b5paig%3D%3D)
---
Friend,

I wanted to be sure you saw my speech this week calling out the NBA's executives and athletes for their defense of the Chinese Communist Party. Given LeBron James's recent comments covering for China's shameful actions in Hong Kong, I think that instead of calling him King James, it's probably more accurate to say "Chairman LeBron."

Instead of shilling for Beijing, the NBA should use its enormous leverage with the 500 million basketball fans in China to be a beacon of freedom. We can't let them off the hook.

Thanks for all your support,
Tom

* * *
**Sen. Tom Cotton — Speech from the Senate Floor
October 16, 2019**
As we speak, the brave people of Hong Kong are demonstrating to protect their freedoms from the Chinese Communist Party in Beijing.

Chinese state TV has portrayed these millions of demonstrators as violent anarchists and separatists.

But these Hong Kongers are merely insisting that China live up to the promises it made to Hong Kong and the United Kingdom—promises China made as binding conditions of the transfer of sovereignty from London to Beijing.

The Chinese government promised that Hong Kong would "enjoy a high degree of autonomy," including many of the freedoms that Beijing denies to its more than one billion subjects on the mainland.

But as the world has learned through bitter experience, the Chinese Communist Party's promises are worth less than the paper they're written on.

Slowly but surely, Beijing has chipped away at the independence it promised Hong Kong—disappearing citizens guilty of wrongthink, undermining Hong Kong's long-standing political and judicial systems, and issuing menacing threats of military intervention to crush the demonstrations.

Most Americans are rightly outraged by China's brutal crackdown in Hong Kong. Daryl Morey was one of them. He's the general manager of the Houston Rockets. Just a few days ago, he tweeted this simple, justified phrase: "Fight for freedom, stand with Hong Kong."

Morey probably knew his words would offend the Chinese Communist Party. But he was also violating a different party line—that of his own league, the NBA.

For daring to speak up about Hong Kong, Morey was disavowed by his team, his fellow executives, and some of the most famous athletes in the NBA. That's because he was threatening not only the powers that be in China, but the cash cow that China represents for American business, including professional basketball.

China's government may be red, but its money is green—and plenty of people are willing to cash its checks, no matter the cost.

The league's biggest star, LeBron James, said that Morey's support for Hong Kong was "misinformed" and "not educated." He reportedly called for Morey to be punished. Perhaps it's no coincidence that LeBron stands to make billions of dollars from the Chinese market—not only from a higher salary cap, shoe sales, and Nike ads, but also from his movie company.

Often known as King James, perhaps Chairman LeBron would be a better honorific today.

Joe Tsai, owner of the Brooklyn Nets, called the protests in Hong Kong a "separatist movement" that was trying to "carve up Chinese territories," like colonial powers or Imperial Japan. Perhaps it's no coincidence that Mr. Tsai is an executive at Alibaba, a Chinese company that developed a Communist propaganda app that hijacked the cellphones of anyone who downloaded it.

At a Wizards game last week, security confiscated a protest sign that said simply, "Google Uighurs"—referring to the native people of western China whose culture and religion are being exterminated by the Chinese Communist Party. That sign was confiscated not in China, by the secret police, but right here in America's national capital.

Steve Kerr, the head coach of the Golden State Warriors, drew a moral equivalence between Communist China and the United States of America. "None of us are perfect," he said, "and we all have different issues we need to get to."

Nobody's perfect. That's what he says of an authoritarian regime that starved, shot, or beat to death 50 million of its own people in a forced march to modernity. A regime that runs a network of concentration camps in its western provinces and harvests the organs of political prisoners for its own pampered elite. "Nobody's perfect," indeed.

This is craven and greedy behavior, and it stands in stark contrast to how America has historically used sports to promote our interests and aspirations, from the triumph of black Olympians in Hitler's Germany to the Miracle on Ice against the Soviet Union. Even our diplomatic opening to China happened through sports, with "Ping-Pong diplomacy."

Today, the tables have turned. China is using sports to export its authoritarian model to our soil. So far, it has found too many willing enforcers in the NBA.

But it doesn't have to be this way. Commissioner Adam Silver, after a slow start, admirably defended Daryl Morey's right to speak his mind about Hong Kong. He said free expression is "what you guys stand for."

American companies kowtow to China not because they love its government but because of the tremendous pressure that government can exert on their operations. But the NBA is in a unique position.

Beijing can ban an airline or it can ban a hotel that lists Taiwan as a country in its online dropdown menu—and the Chinese people can use a different airline or hotel. But there's only one NBA. Beijing can't create another one.

And here's the rub. There are more than 500 million basketball fans in China. More people in China follow the NBA than there are people in the United States.

So no doubt Beijing has some leverage over the NBA, as it does over all businesses—but the NBA has a lot of leverage over Beijing.

Is the NBA really going to ban the entire league, as they've done for the Houston Rockets, at the risk of alienating over 500 million people who follow the league—and the resultant public backlash that could create?

So instead of acting as a bullhorn for communist propaganda in America, the NBA could be a beacon of freedom to China. It could dare China to shut them out.

So let me urge all the NBA executives and athletes who claim to care about "social justice": Don't just speak out when the stakes are low for you personally, or when the cause is popular among your friends. Speak out now, when the stakes are deadly high for millions of Hong Kongers and more than a billion Chinese—including many of your fans.

LeBron James, you tweeted not long ago that "Injustice anywhere is a threat to justice everywhere." Live out that principle consistently. There are a million Uighurs in concentration camps yearning to hear a champion who speaks out on their behalf—particularly because the NBA runs an elite training facility in proximity to those camps.

Steve Kerr, you've never held back on expressing your opinion about our president. That's fine. That's your right as an American. But how about some outrage for the authoritarian regime in Beijing?

Joe Tsai, you were born in Taiwan. Your fellow Taiwanese live in constant fear of meddling, attack, and subjugation by the mainland. Are they separatists, for wanting to maintain their way of life? Speak out proudly on behalf of your homeland about the true nature of the government in Beijing.

I realize this is a hard thing to ask any person. No doubt this is a harder path than the path many in the NBA is traveling at present. It would require sacrifice, and it would certainly invite the wrath of the Chinese Communist Party. But if the league used its unique leverage for freedom, millions of ordinary Chinese would surely notice, despite an army of Chinese Communist censors arrayed against them.

The NBA didn't pick this fight. It probably prefers to avoid this fight. But the Chinese Communist Party wants this fight. So the choice isn't to fight or not, it's to win or lose.

Perhaps alone among American businesses, the NBA has a shot to win against Beijing. In any fight against communists, there can be only one strategy, one policy: Victory.
###

_Senator Cotton was honorably discharged from the U.S. Army.
Images do not imply endorsement by the Department of Defense or any service branch._

PO Box 7504
Little Rock, AR 72217-7504
| | PAID FOR BY COTTON FOR SENATE
---

name: Jay Inslee
subject: They're hoping you aren't paying attention
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
This matters so much.
| [](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/7058?t=3&akid=7970%2E868730%2E-ynWH0) Friend, I feel like there's no such thing as a "slow news day" anymore -- but that's _exactly_ why this deadline matters: While Donald Trump and his cronies are taking unquestionably illegal actions in the White House, they're hoping folks like you forget what's at stake in states like Washington. They're hoping we lose focus on climate change and on making real progress for working families because of the chaos they're creating in D.C. We can't let them. State work matters now more than ever, especially because no work is getting done in D.C. -- I'm ready to keep fighting for working families, but today's deadline really matters. We're trying to raise $25,000 by midnight to show the GOP and my self-funded millionaire opponent that being Governor is not up for sale in Washington state. [**I'm counting on you, right now, to step up when it counts: We're just $5,768 short of our $25,000 goal. Will you donate $1 or more now?**](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/7058?t=5&akid=7970%2E868730%2E-ynWH0) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$1 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/7059?t=6&akid=7970%2E868730%2E-ynWH0)

They're hoping we lose focus on climate change and on making real progress for working families because of the chaos they're creating in D.C. We can't let them. State work matters now more than ever, especially because no work is getting done in D.C. -- I'm ready to keep fighting for working families, but today's deadline really matters. We're trying to raise $25,000 by midnight to show the GOP and my self-funded millionaire opponent that being Governor is not up for sale in Washington state. body:

There are few people who are more dedicated to improving the lives of Kentuckians than my friend Andy Beshear. I'm thrilled to support him for governor and I hope you are, too.

name: Corky Messner
subject: Doing the right thing
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MESSNER FOR SENATE
body:
Are you with me in this fight? Let’s stand united & proud to DEFEND President Trump from this impeachment sham! Read more >>
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/9e61a011f3d12742/5003e0765d94dde6c3d6b838967d376c/33153) Peter, Do you know why I'm running for U.S. Senate? If not, let me tell you. My decision to enter this race is a continuation of my lifelong mission to do the right thing. It's why I attended West Point as a young man, and joined the Army Rangers to serve during the Cold War. It's why I decided to start a business and create jobs. It's why I’m running to defeat Jeanne Shaheen, who I know does not share our core values. **And doing the RIGHT thing is why I stand with President Trump against the Democrats' reckless and fact-challenged impeachment scheme!** Enough is enough. We cannot stand by while the Democrats and "Fake News" media once again attempt to mislead the American people. **[Will you help me in the fight to DEFEND President Trump, by making a $10, $25, $50, or $100 special contribution today?](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/9e61a011f3d12742/3ddb5d27a3ffe31cc3d6b838967d376c/33153)** My team has told me you're with me. I hope you are. The fact is, it's going to take ALL of us fighting together, united and ready to give the Democrats hell, to STOP this witch hunt once and for all! We MUST defeat Democrats here in New Hampshire and across America. It's time they know that tearing apart our great country for political gain will cost them their cherished political "careers" in Washington. This impeachment sham is NOT about truth or justice. The fact is, the Democrats have been on a mission to defeat President Trump since the day he was inaugurated. And now they're grasping at the flimsiest of straws. They will not be happy until they overturn the results of the 2016 election. **They want to steal away our votes and silence our voice!** Don't let them succeed, Peter. **[Join with me in calling out Jeanne Shaheen, Nancy Pelosi, and 'The Squad' in Congress, and help us ramp up to turn New Hampshire "RED" in 2020.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/9e61a011f3d12742/0e02fd9100446396c3d6b838967d376c/33153)** Thank you in advance for ANY level of support you can help with. Sincerely, [ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/9e61a011f3d12742/804bbc6fde8f4076c3d6b838967d376c/33153) Bryant "Corky" Messner **[TAKE ACTION NOW: Help me fight to DEFEND President Trump!>>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/9e61a011f3d12742/65c33444172487b8c3d6b838967d376c/33153)** id:2019-09-24-19:25:50:479t | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/9e61a011f3d12742/5b89a3ddd075b98ec3d6b838967d376c/33153) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/9e61a011f3d12742/b2704cc17d2263c9c3d6b838967d376c/33153)

subject: Triple Endorsement for LaTurner!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kansans for LaTurner
body:
🚩 Senator Steve Fitzgerald, Speaker Doug Mays, and Former Rep. Kevin Jones Endorse Jake LaTurner for Congress | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/55c8dd6d47c4/for-immediate-release-kansas-state-treasurer-jake-laturner-announces-candidacy-for-us-congress-1354889?e=1050d051da)
---
| |
---
| | Friends,

More great news for the Kansans for LaTurner campaign today! Senator Steve Fitzgerald, Speaker Doug Mays, and Former State Representative Kevin Jones have endorsed Jake LaTurner as their candidate of choice for Congress.

Each of these three great Kansans are former candidates for the 2nd Congressional District seat, and in last year's primary election received a combined 35% of the primary vote, while Watkins won with the support of only 26.5% of primary voters.

Here's what they had to say:
---
| | _“Nobody has more energy or more political savvy and courage than Jake. As a Senator Jake was a pro-life, low-tax, pro-gun, constitutional rights leader sponsoring and carrying bills that advanced Conservative principals. As Treasurer of Kansas he has worked hard to reunite Kansans with their property that the state was holding, he worked to get the federal government to return US Savings Bonds to their rightful owners, and he has gone to great lengths to encourage Kansas parents to invest in their children's college funds. He will be a Congressman Kansans can be proud of.” _

-Steve Fitzgerald, U.S. Army LTC Retired, Former Kansas State Senator
---
|
---
| | _“I know Jake to be a family man of good moral character, who we can count on to go to Washington and represent our state well. He is willing to stand up and take the arrows on conservative issues, regardless of whether it is popular.”_

-Kevin Jones, former U.S. Army Green Beret and Kansas House member.
---
|
---
| | _“Jake is a true conservative with a record of success to prove it. He has what it takes to keep this seat from falling into the hands of the Democrats, and I fully endorse him as the best candidate for Kansas’ 2 nd Congressional district.”_

-Doug Mays, former Speaker of the Kansas House of Representatives
---
|
---
| We are thrilled to have support from these three dedicated public servants and the many more Kansans who continue to join Team LaTurner. Jake is committed to going to Washington and fighting tirelessly for what is right.

With the significant fundraising advantage we have continued to maintain over Watkins, we are well on our way to winning this race in 2020. Will you help us keep that lead locked in with a [donation](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=f49d762113&e=1050d051da) to our campaign this quarter?

name: Peter Khalil
subject: Money in Politics
body:
| | | | We don't need big money to flip the 3rd!
---
---
**—**
Here is my recent statement to the Columbian newspaper about money in politics in the 3rd District of Washington:
***
Last cycle should prove beyond a reasonable doubt that money does not win elections. Our candidates in 2018 spent an appalling amount of money contending for this seat that served only to enrich political operatives and companies who profit from the broken campaign-finance system in this country. That money could have been put toward the betterment of society – housing homeless people, paying off medical debts, educating our children. Instead it went toward a food fight that ended with the preservation of the status quo. We mean it when we say we are a populist campaign. We are following a deliberate fundraising plan that acknowledges the need for sustainability but that prioritizes deep canvassing and real connection over traditional forms of outreach. The model here is AOC vs. Joe Crowley. We studied that contest very carefully and are making the type of deep and true connections with people that money simply cannot buy.
We focused last quarter on making those connections with the expectation that we would be eschewing traditional metrics of campaign strength. These metrics don’t apply in 2019 as a wave of populism is making boots on the ground more important than ads on the airwaves. We are building a volunteer movement here – one where people who believe in us and our policies are willing to go out and give their all for the cause. Some observers in the party and the press seek to count us out by measuring us against a rubric that applied to last century’s elections. We are going to shock them all next August. I want to say one thing generally about this race. Any time a newcomer approaches a run for Congress they are branded as “improbable.” Well, I’ve spent my life achieving the improbable – or even the seemingly impossible. As you may know, I’m a cornea transplant recipient who has dealt with two decades of a degenerative eye disease that has no cure. At 17, I was told to give up the idea of being a lawyer or a doctor, because the condition would almost certainly steal my sight. Not only did I get through one of the top law schools in this country, but I passed one of the country's hardest bar exams – New York – with extremely impaired vision and worked at the top of my field during one of our country’s most trying times. My team and I all have similar stories. We defy odds. And we have a long time to show everyone that we’re here to win.
*** My friends, we don't need a disgusting amount of money to win this race. $5 a month is all we ask of you today. [$5 a month](https://u10586488.ct.sendgrid.net/wf/click?upn=10t0p6avH1KpWV5M4QYvw222veUq8VN67-2BhYJqa-2B5BQgtb2Huhzyt38JMUax2fBy_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFlXvvEpEZOb1revOs71Gl5pJWNYxsuh8oExvqRDcMcnxwEBKfbUFVOVw8TahBEGPsdc8GkGCaCklvbVwQ4E59uZt0fLiQ5EOhdwB3JNGXO-2BKHLZmOuPWT1L-2FNbqeGi8Lnmqc-2BbkYthUHploFEC-2BlyirWTre9gc8Wak7Grv7fxJKlt-2B35YWaC1ynfYYAXBtdj0qDLT0qaDzPVQ13u5bWOaaEIAweJgikt-2F-2BtDaNGd-2Bu9tvV23sH8VXYLrEtDrr5uR17JiB1pDzMcah31n72fAbcG14dhfrpePpjypWhhw7dB4InQxsNvzvgSo6-2BjOlsdhdupec-2FIyHVyYBN2ZraSyhOPaI1S-2Fb43XTpL-2B8OIizhdWKoCt3-2B1QFSVYFrjCoDPxWg6QTAXjKPYcDVmCoLTIhDTQ1cgWY8eS8BrbLx2TS4yXu2nP6NMznW-2FH9j9mBJxcm308lHgIGFuUgt1uk7OCrYcNBfjxX3ZjHlD1b69XgbJjAELRIiNw9nROQMJgAwjXJ8m7UFXjwVirwAmXr9ZDFxoW48yOsOeL73-2BpPDi54h2A-3D-3D) is an investment in a movement to restore the idea that our government exists to give everyone an equal opportunity to have a good life.
