clean_body: | | | | We don't need big money to flip the 3rd! — Here is my recent statement to the Columbian newspaper about money in politics in the 3rd District of Washington: * Last cycle should prove beyond a reasonable doubt that money does not win elections. Our candidates in 2018 spent an appalling amount of money contending for this seat that served only to enrich political operatives and companies who profit from the broken campaign-finance system in this country. That money could have been put toward the betterment of society – housing homeless people, paying off medical debts, educating our children. Instead it went toward a food fight that ended with the preservation of the status quo. We mean it when we say we are a populist campaign. We are following a deliberate fundraising plan that acknowledges the need for sustainability but that prioritizes deep canvassing and real connection over traditional forms of outreach. The model here is AOC vs. Joe Crowley. We studied that contest very carefully and are making the type of deep and true connections with people that money simply cannot buy. We focused last quarter on making those connections with the expectation that we would be eschewing traditional metrics of campaign strength. These metrics don’t apply in 2019 as a wave of populism is making boots on the ground more important than ads on the airwaves. We are building a volunteer movement here – one where people who believe in us and our policies are willing to go out and give their all for the cause. Some observers in the party and the press seek to count us out by measuring us against a rubric that applied to last century’s elections. We are going to shock them all next August. I want to say one thing generally about this race. Any time a newcomer approaches a run for Congress they are branded as “improbable.” Well, I’ve spent my life achieving the improbable – or even the seemingly impossible. As you may know, I’m a cornea transplant recipient who has dealt with two decades of a degenerative eye disease that has no cure. At 17, I was told to give up the idea of being a lawyer or a doctor, because the condition would almost certainly steal my sight. Not only did I get through one of the top law schools in this country, but I passed one of the country's hardest bar exams – New York – with extremely impaired vision and worked at the top of my field during one of our country’s most trying times. My team and I all have similar stories. We defy odds. And we have a long time to show everyone that we’re here to win. * My friends, we don't need a disgusting amount of money to win this race. $5 a month is all we ask of you today. is an investment in a movement to restore the idea that our government exists to give everyone an equal opportunity to have a good life. If you haven't donated yet, please do. If you've donated once, please consider a small recurring donation. We count on small sustaining donors to keep us going. Together, we will flip the 3rd! With gratitude and excitement, Peter Fuel the Progressive movement in SW Washington by becoming a sustaining donor! |

Arizona's 2018 Senate race was so close, a victor couldn't be declared until **days after** Election Night.
**The 2020 Senate race could be even closer and even costlier.** Every dollar raised between now and the election will decide how successfully candidates like Mark can respond to McConnell's lies and attacks.

314 Action is a grassroots community of nearly 1 million people working to elect Democratic scientists who will use science and facts to address some of our most pressing issues like climate change and health care. In 2018 we played a pivotal role in flipping the US House of Representatives by electing 9 Democratic scientists to the House and Senate as well as over 100 to key legislative districts while raising over $5.2 million with an average donation of just $27.55. Now we're focused on flipping the US Senate, defeating 25 climate deniers in Congress and flipping key state legislatures across the country.

name: Team Lewis
subject: The Lewis Newsletter - PRESIDENT TRUMP'S ENDORSEMENT!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Lewis for Senate
body:
What a week it's been for the Jason Lewis for Senate campaign, with Jason becoming the first 2020 GOP candidate in Minnesota to receive President Trump's ENTHUSIASTIC ENDORSEMENT for his United States Senate bid against do-nothing ultra liberal Senator Tina Smith!
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5b71fafb5ba1f9d636ff93d4ab7bd0b7/33183/db05018c6ebd9aa2/86fd60d596d33ec2c3d6b838967d376c/33183) **The Lewis Newsletter** [ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5b71fafb5ba1f9d636ff93d4ab7bd0b7/33183/db05018c6ebd9aa2/91a8593d2bf48678c3d6b838967d376c/33183) Friends,

Thanks for reading our campaign’s first bi-weekly newsletter! What a week it's been for the Jason Lewis for Senate campaign, with Jason becoming the first 2020 GOP candidate in Minnesota to receive President Trump's ENTHUSIASTIC ENDORSEMENT for his United States Senate bid against do-nothing ultra liberal Senator Tina Smith!

President Trump said it best...Tina Smith "hasn't done a damn thing in the Senate," and Minnesota needs Jason Lewis. Take a look... [ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5b71fafb5ba1f9d636ff93d4ab7bd0b7/33183/db05018c6ebd9aa2/91783476a709b645c3d6b838967d376c/33183) While that was certainly the highlight of the night at Donald Trump's record-setting rally on Thursday night, it was an eventful evening afterward. Like the rest of our fellow rally-goers, Jason and I had to wait well over an hour to get out of the Target Center on Thursday due to the raucous protests outside which saw numerous members of Antifa show up to commit violence and chaos. There were fires as well as assaults on police officers and their horses. Jason took a moment to address the situation (not to mention Minneapolis Mayor Jacob Frey's failure of leadership) from the crowded skyway... [ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5b71fafb5ba1f9d636ff93d4ab7bd0b7/33183/db05018c6ebd9aa2/3adbe39f001a3f38c3d6b838967d376c/33183) Our campaign has clear and strong momentum after the President's endorsement, and the Democrats know they're in trouble. **[Recently the DFL Party Chairman admitted that Democrats in Minnesota "can't keep up" with President Trump/GOP campaign efforts in Minnesota](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5b71fafb5ba1f9d636ff93d4ab7bd0b7/33183/db05018c6ebd9aa2/da70286c0f03334dc3d6b838967d376c/33183)**. As Jason himself said **[in this article](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5b71fafb5ba1f9d636ff93d4ab7bd0b7/33183/db05018c6ebd9aa2/a21c9529964a74a8c3d6b838967d376c/33183)** , Minnesota is front and center and extremely competitive, evidenced by the President's visit this week!

That wasn't all the news that came out of Thursday though! Before the rally, Jason personally welcomed Vice-President Pence back to Minnesota with a visit to Safety Signs, LLC in Lakeville, a family-owned business that produces highway signs and road/safety equipment. You can read more about it by **[clicking here!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5b71fafb5ba1f9d636ff93d4ab7bd0b7/33183/db05018c6ebd9aa2/c72afe30765c2f99c3d6b838967d376c/33183)** There's even more from last week, though! **[In an Op-Ed from Jason published in the Austin Daily Herald](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5b71fafb5ba1f9d636ff93d4ab7bd0b7/33183/db05018c6ebd9aa2/de7e2d6a0e224495c3d6b838967d376c/33183)** , Jason proudly promoted his record in working with President Trump to pass the largest tax cuts in a generation which have ushered in unprecedented economic growth, while correctly pointing out that Tina Smith's policies are harming middle class Minnesotans.

As you can see friends, we have built a lot of momentum since launching our campaign on August 22nd, but we are only just getting started. We need you to help us if we are to be successful in unseating Tina Smith next November and ensuring our ten electoral votes are delivered to President Trump. **[Please sign up to volunteer](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5b71fafb5ba1f9d636ff93d4ab7bd0b7/33183/db05018c6ebd9aa2/10a81624aab6a7bdc3d6b838967d376c/33183)** , or **[pledge a generous contribution today](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5b71fafb5ba1f9d636ff93d4ab7bd0b7/33183/db05018c6ebd9aa2/74879c89ce5b51ddc3d6b838967d376c/33183)** so that we can keep the momentum going!

I know I speak for Jason when I say thanks so much for all your ongoing support, see you on the campaign trail!

Tom Szymanski
Campaign Manager | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5b71fafb5ba1f9d636ff93d4ab7bd0b7/33183/db05018c6ebd9aa2/09e83f67a2585e0ec3d6b838967d376c/33183) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5b71fafb5ba1f9d636ff93d4ab7bd0b7/33183/db05018c6ebd9aa2/1b3ec68971516695c3d6b838967d376c/33183) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5b71fafb5ba1f9d636ff93d4ab7bd0b7/33183/db05018c6ebd9aa2/91df95f1c8045c2bc3d6b838967d376c/33183)
---|---|---
|
---
Paid for by Jason Lewis for Senate
|
---

This email was sent by: Jason Lewis
PO Box 4514, St. Paul, MN, 55104
[Profile Center](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/procenter/procenter.cfm?action=profile&eid=5b71fafb5ba1f9d636ff93d4ab7bd0b7&c=33183&jid=db05018c6ebd9aa2)
[Unsubscribe](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/unsubscribe1.cfm?eid=5b71fafb5ba1f9d636ff93d4ab7bd0b7&c=33183&jid=db05018c6ebd9aa2)
[View as webpage](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/vm2/db05018c6ebd9aa2/33183/5b71fafb5ba1f9d636ff93d4ab7bd0b7/33183)

name: Team Franken
subject: NEW POLL: Joni Ernst is sinking
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Franken for Iowa
body:
A new poll out this morning shows just 39% of Iowans approve of Sen. Joni Ernst. We need your help to keep up the momentum.
|
---

| | Friends -- Just this morning, a new poll shows that Iowa voters are ready for a change. Just 39% of Iowans approve of Joni Ernst. That's a **nine point drop** , bigger than any other Senator running for re-election. Our grassroots team has been working to build momentum for months, but we can't let up now. **[Can you chip in now to help us keep up the momentum?](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2479/33365068/4a65e2bb/3f8bb87c/3951309347/VEsH/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franken-october?refcode=20191017_fr_em")** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [Donate $10 now](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2479/33365068/4a65e2bb/3f8bb87d/3951309347/VEsE/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franken-october?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=20191017_fr_em_express_lane_10")
---
[Donate $25 Now](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2479/33365068/4a65e2bb/3f8bb87e/3951309347/VEsF/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franken-october?express_lane=true&amount= 25&refcode=20191017_fr_em_express_lane_ 25")
---
[Donate $50 Now](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2479/33365068/4a65e2bb/3f8bb87f/3951309347/VEsC/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franken-october?express_lane=true&amount= 50&refcode=20191017_fr_em_express_lane_ 50")
---
[Other Amount](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2479/33365068/4a65e2bb/3f8bb878/3951309347/VEsD/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franken-october?refcode=20191017_fr_em_express_lane_other")
---
These numbers may be alarming to Joni Ernst, but they aren't surprising to us. Mike has traveled to every corner of the state and voters everywhere are frustrated.They want action.
They want to see results on gun violence prevention and climate change. And most of all, they want a Senator that will put Iowans first - above themselves, party politics, and special interests.
Mike has made it clear that he'll stand up for what's right. That's why he opposed the Iraq war before it started and it's why he was the first candidate in the race to call for the impeachment inquiry to proceed.
[Donate Today](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2479/33365068/4a65e2bb/3f8bb879/3951309347/VEsA/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franken-october?refcode=20191017_fr_em_button")
---
Thanks,
Team Franken

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Do you support legalizing marijuana?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Peter, In 2016, the U.S. incarcerated a whopping 2.2 million of its citizens \-- more than any other country. We also spent over $47 billion to combat drugs, with more than $3 billion of that going to combat marijuana, even though 11 states and the District of Columbia have legalized its recreational use. The result is a lopsided "War on Drugs" that has decimated cities across the country and widened the divides of inequality to new levels: 46.9% of those charged with marijuana possession are Black or Latinx, despite making up only 31.5% of the population and marijuana use being consistent across races. This needs to stop. And it needs to stop at the federal level \-- we can't wait for legislatures to get on board state-by-state. [**Legalizing marijuana would go a long way in reducing these unjust and harmful practices in our legal system, as well as ensuring universal application of the law. Please join us in urging Congress to legalize marijuana today and take a stand for fairness and equality.**](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd86/6e9863e8/1586baa0/1db0f5bf/746995941/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://www.paction.us/marijuanalegalization/when_democrats_turn_out_PAC") Thank you, The WDTO Team [SIGN THE PETITION](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd86/6e9863e8/1586baa0/1db0f5bf/746995941/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://www.paction.us/marijuanalegalization/when_democrats_turn_out_PAC")

name: Team Tina
subject: How we defend the right to choose >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
Tina was just endorsed by Planned Parenthood Action Fund. Now more than ever, we need to work together to defend the right to choose. Chip in now to stand with Tina and Planned Parenthood in defending

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-oct2019?refcode=em191017ppafendo-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=") Friend, we have some news.

**Tina has been endorsed by Planned Parenthood Action Fund!**

Tina is the only Senator to have worked for Planned Parenthood, so we know she'll do everything in her power to stand up for reproductive health care.

Right now, the Trump-Pence administration is working hard to dismantle Title X, which is a critical source of federal funding for clinics like Planned Parenthood. Title X has allowed tens of thousands of Minnesotans to access primary care and family planning services -- but this administration's new rule means that health care providers who receive Title X funding can't inform patients about their full range of reproductive health care options, including abortions. Instead of abiding by this administration's rule, Planned Parenthood has withdrawn from the Title X program, so they can keep caring for their patients to the best of their ability.

There's no question: Planned Parenthood is under attack. Health care is under attack. Our rights are under attack.

**Planned Parenthood Action Fund endorsed Tina because she will work hard to defend reproductive health care, but it takes all of us working together to defend reproductive health care for Minnesotans and all Americans.**

**[Now more than ever, reproductive health care is on the line. Chip in $10, $25, $50 or whatever you can if you're with Tina and Planned Parenthood in defending access to abortion care.](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-oct2019?refcode=em191017ppafendo-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")** [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-oct2019?refcode=em191017ppafendo-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=") Our ability to protect reproductive health care depends on the Senate. We cannot afford more anti-choice appointments confirmed to the Supreme Court, and we need more Planned Parenthood allies like Tina in the Senate ready to stop them.

**Tina will always stand up for reproductive health care, and we need your help so she can keep fighting.**

**[Chip in now so that Tina can keep fighting for reproductive health care and a person's right to choose in the Senate.](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-oct2019?refcode=em191017ppafendo-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

Fighting with you,

Team Tina | **U.S. Senator Tina Smith is running for re-election in 2020 in a race _NBC News_ has already labeled a "race to watch" with Donald Trump targeting Minnesota for victory. Make sure she has the resources to fight back.** [CONTRIBUTE](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-oct2019?refcode=em191017ppafendo-full-biobox&amount=10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&recurring=auto")
---

[Click here to unsubscribe](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc41a27/c1f7015/6716a189/1145f894/1606066519/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). subject: Tell Mitch McConnell: Let the Senate vote to hang up on scam robocalls

body:

But unfortunately, Mitch McConnell continues to refuse to let the US Senate hold a vote on passing this critical consumer protection measure.

## Thank you all for continuing to vote!
---
|
---
| | Monday night's "Disney Night" quickstep was definitely the most challenging dance so far, but also my strongest performance and our highest scores.

I continue to be humbled by the support everyone has shown me, including the President, who tweeted out his support.

Because no one was eliminated last week, your votes and our scores from last week will be combined with the ones from this coming Monday. We are dancing a "Viennese Waltz" which will be a real challenge, but we are working harder than ever to get ready.
---
|
---
---
| | Voting reminders:

Please think about setting a calendar reminder for Monday at 8pm ET (7 CT, 6 MT and 5 PT).

Remeber to cast all 20 votes.

After texting SEAN 10 times to 21523 make sure to cast the additional 10 at abc.com. It requires creating an account so please do that ahead of the show. As a reminder only the votes cast while the show is live in the eastern and central times zones count. If you live in mountain or pacific time zones you have to vote before the show airs locally.
---
|
Thanks again everyone,

_Sean_
---

name: Mark Warner
subject: Laying the groundwork for 2020
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
This was an important week for our campaign. On Tuesday, we officially filed our quarterly fundraising numbers with the FEC for the first time since former Republican Congressman Scott Taylor announce
|
---
| | Derek,

This was an important week for our campaign. On Tuesday, we officially filed our quarterly fundraising numbers with the FEC for the first time since former Republican Congressman Scott Taylor announced he was running against me.

Today, I have some good news to share: With your help, and with grassroots support from across Virginia, we raised $1.8 million -- shattering the record for Virginia Senate contests in an off-year third quarter.

From the bottom of my heart, I want to thank you for your support. Every dollar matters when we're up against Donald Trump's GOP, and there's no way we would have made it this far without you.

**This is incredible grassroots momentum, but frankly, I need you to be a part of it if we're going to be successful on election day 2020.[So I want to personally ask you, will you make your first contribution to our people-powered campaign?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d056/53d9897e/52633e5d/1c8d07d1/232811261/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI4MyJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-db?refcode=20191017nd__283__&refcode2=ask1_b&amount=5") Your support will help us get a strong start toward our next quarter's fundraising goal.** Let's face it, that's a lot of money we're talking about, so I think I ought to tell you briefly about how we're planning to use that money to win. As you read this, our campaign is laying the groundwork for 2020 -- hiring key staffers; setting budgets for TV, mail, and digital ads; and planning our field outreach efforts that will take our message directly to Virginia voters. At the same time, I'm working hard to support our General Assembly candidates who are on the ballot next month, because flipping the legislature in 2019 is so important to expanding health care access, funding public education, and finally bringing about commonsense gun law reform here in Virginia. It will also send a strong message across the Commonwealth and around the country heading into the 2020 election.

All of this costs money, and none of it would be possible without grassroots support from folks chipping in with gifts of $5 or $10 or whatever they're able to manage. **So, I want to personally ask you to make that first contribution and help us keep up the grassroots momentum we had this quarter. Can I count on you?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[DONATE $5](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d056/53d9897e/52633e5d/1c8d07d0/232811261/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI4MyJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-db?express_lane=true&refcode=20191017nd__283__&refcode2=express_lane_1_b&amount=5")** **[DONATE $10](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d056/53d9897e/52633e5d/1c8d07df/232811261/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI4MyJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-db?express_lane=true&refcode=20191017nd__283__&refcode2=express_lane_2_b&amount=10")** **[DONATE $25](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d056/53d9897e/52633e5d/1c8d07de/232811261/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI4MyJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-db?express_lane=true&refcode=20191017nd__283__&refcode2=express_lane_3_b&amount=25")** **[DONATE $50](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d056/53d9897e/52633e5d/1c8d07dd/232811261/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI4MyJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-db?express_lane=true&refcode=20191017nd__283__&refcode2=express_lane_4_b&amount=50")** **[DONATE $100](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d056/53d9897e/52633e5d/1c8d07dc/232811261/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI4MyJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-db?express_lane=true&refcode=20191017nd__283__&refcode2=express_lane_5_b&amount=100")** **[CHOOSE AN AMOUNT](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d056/53d9897e/52633e5d/1c8d07db/232811261/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI4MyJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-db?refcode=20191017nd__283__&refcode2=express_lane_other_b")** When I ran for re-election in 2014, we faced a massive influx of special interest attacks. It was a tough campaign, and we only won by the narrowest of margins. With the Trump campaign targeting Virginia and Republican opponents now officially in the race, we have to assume 2020 will be even tougher. More importantly, we need to do everything we can to beat Donald Trump and keep Virginia blue in 2020.

That's why I'm going to keep working hard to build this campaign and grow our grassroots team of supporters who make it possible. This is a good day for our campaign, but we've got to keep fighting if we're going to be successful. Thanks for all you do to make that possible.

-- Mark | ****[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d056/53d9897e/52633e5d/1c8d07da/232811261/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI4MyJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-db?refcode=20191017nd__283__&refcode2=cont_b&amount=5")****
---

|

1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213
Williamsburg, VA 23185

name: =?utf-8?Q?David=20Perdue?=
subject: Since DAY ONE. Literally.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PERDUE FOR SENATE**
body:
| |
---
| | [ ](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=2a12f5f6b7&e=02cd889ad3)
---
| |
#
Peter,

Since day one, radical Democrats have been trying to impeach President Trump. Literally. This is the height of already historic obstructionism. These Democrats have weaponized our government for their political gain.

President Trump is counting on us more than ever before. It’s critical that he has a Republican Senate majority that will help him fight back.

| | Democrats lost Michigan in 2016. We can't afford to lose it again in 2020. That's why Republicans are piling on Democratic Senator Gary Peters, and why he needs your help right now. _Here's what you need to know:_**With the support of the Republican establishment, his opponent raised over $3 million just in the last three months -- putting Sen. Peters at the top of the "at risk" list.** [**Donate to Michigan's Gary Peters so we can take back the Senate in 2020.**](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2cf06/6cd27893/525f8734/15876480/1938771678/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjl2Ym1WOWZRPT0iOiI1IiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjkwZDI5OWZRPT0iOiIxNSIsImUzdGhZbUZ0ZEY5MGFISmxaWDE5IjoiMjUiLCJlM3RoWW1GdGRGOW1iM1Z5ZlgwPSI6IjUwIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjltYVhabGZYMD0iOiIxMDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/merkley-peters?refcode=2019-10-17-peters&recurring=1&amount=3&amounts=5,15,25,50,100") Across the country, **Gary is one of just two Democratic senators running in a state that Donald Trump won.** And that means all eyes are on this race. Over a million dollars a month pouring into his right-wing opponent's campaign. Tens of thousands of attack ads, each nastier than the last. body:
We're on the air!
# [](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c9b/4bef7a87/6b5f6e73/287fd4a5/642678116/VEsH/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_header")

Friend - it's been an exciting week for our campaign!
First, we filed our FEC report and outraised Susan Collins. Today, we have another important announcement:
_Our first ad is on the air!_
**Watch our new ad here and share with your friends on social media:**
[](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c9b/4bef7a87/6b5f6e73/287fd4a4/642678116/VEsE/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=wpWwWlSH5bE")
**[_Facebook_](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c9b/4bef7a87/6b5f6e73/287fd4bb/642678116/VEsF/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://www.facebook.com/watch/?v=776280506126192") [_Twitter_](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c9b/4bef7a87/6b5f6e73/287fd4ba/642678116/VEsC/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://twitter.com/SaraGideon/status/1184877370995597317?s=20") [_Youtube_](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c9b/4bef7a87/6b5f6e73/287fd4a4/642678116/VEsD/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=wpWwWlSH5bE")**
This is a critical step for our campaign. It's how we get Sara's positive message out on a massive scale, so it's important we get as many eyes on it as possible.
Thanks for helping spread the word. We hope you enjoy!
\- Team Sara
****[WATCH THE AD](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c9b/4bef7a87/6b5f6e73/287fd4a4/642678116/VEsA/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=wpWwWlSH5bE")****

* * *
Sara Gideon for Maine
PO Box 812
South Freeport, ME 04078

name: Kristen Foca
subject: The numbers are in
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stephanie for New Jersey**
body:
The numbers are in, and we can't stop our grassroots movement now.
|
---

| | Friends,

We told you at the beginning of this campaign that we're not backed by big corporate money -- **we 're fueled by grassroots support.** Fundraising reports just came in and they show that Stephanie is the candidate in this race to take on Rep. Chris Smith. And it took him _three months_ to raise what Stephanie raised in just 25 days. That is what we call a grassroots movement. [**We need to keep this momentum going. Can you commit to a monthly grassroots donation to elect Stephanie?**](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff0b3/522d4087/7afd81b7/4f342dd3/2165041685/VEsH/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stephanienj-october?refcode=20191017_em_link1&recurring=1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=stephanie&utm_content=1+-+We+need+to+keep+this+momentum+going+Can+&utm_campaign=20191017_em&source=20191017_em") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | **[Chip in $3 now](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff0b3/522d4087/7afd81b7/4f342dd2/2165041685/VEsE/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stephanienj-october?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=20191017_em_abx_3&recurring=1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=stephanie&utm_content=2+-+Chip+in+3+now&utm_campaign=20191017_em&source=20191017_em")**
---
**[Chip in $10 now](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff0b3/522d4087/7afd81b7/4f342dd1/2165041685/VEsF/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stephanienj-october?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=20191017_em_abx_10&recurring=1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=stephanie&utm_content=3+-+Chip+in+10+now&utm_campaign=20191017_em&source=20191017_em")**
---
**[Chip in $18 now](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff0b3/522d4087/7afd81b7/4f342dd0/2165041685/VEsC/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stephanienj-october?express_lane=true&amount=18&refcode=20191017_em_abx_18&recurring=1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=stephanie&utm_content=4+-+Chip+in+18+now&utm_campaign=20191017_em&source=20191017_em")**
---
**[Donate another amount now](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff0b3/522d4087/7afd81b7/4f342dcf/2165041685/VEsD/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stephanienj-october?express_lane=true&refcode=20191017_em_abx_other&recurring=1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=stephanie&utm_content=5+-+Donate+another+amount+now&utm_campaign=20191017_em&source=20191017_em")**
---
Smith has been in Congress for nearly 40 years. He's spent all that time in Washington focused on a radical agenda and ignoring his constituents.
He's tried to ban women's access to reproductive healthcare and refused to support the Equality Act and renewal of the Violence Against Women Act. He's also gone nearly 26 years without holding a town hall to listen to the people of this district!
Our members of Congress are there to fight for us, to fight for what we deserve, not to push fringe policies. **We need new leadership in Washington.**
Stephanie knows we deserve; access to affordable health care, a human rights champion, and quality public education. She's dedicated her entire career to human rights, women's rights, and everything in between -- **and she knows her home state of New Jersey needs a fighter.**
Help make sure Stephanie continues this fight in Congress: [**Commit to a monthly grassroots donation today.**](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff0b3/522d4087/7afd81b7/4f342dce/2165041685/VEsA/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stephanienj-october?refcode=20191017_em_other_link2&recurring=1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=stephanie&utm_content=6+-+Commit+to+a+monthly+grassroots+donation+&utm_campaign=20191017_em&source=20191017_em")
Thanks for everything,
Kristen Foca
Deputy Campaign Manager
Stephanie Schmid for Congress
|
---

| | **Paid for by Stephanie for New Jersey**
---
_New Jersey native Stephanie Schmid is running for New Jersey 's 4th Congressional District. Stephanie has a strong record of serving her community, protecting those most vulnerable, and solving difficult public policy problems. She's running to bring new leadership to Congress at a time when we need our leaders to solve pressing challenges and create opportunities for the people of New Jersey._ _Stephanie is running a grassroots campaign rooted in New Jersey values. She's not accepting any corporate PAC donations or money from special interests.[**Can you chip in $5 now to Stephanie's campaign?**](secure.actblue.com/donate/stephanienj-october?refcode=20191017em_footer&amounts=5,10,15,20,25,30,35&amount=5)_

Stephanie for New Jersey
P.O. Box 217
Little Silver, NJ 07739
_Emails like this help us stay in touch with you over the course of the campaign. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. You may click here to[unsubscribe](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff0b3/522d4087/7afd81b7/4f342dcd/2165041685/VEsB/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://stephanie.bsd.net/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=stephanie&utm_content=7+-+unsubscribe&utm_campaign=20191017_em&source=20191017_em") at any time._

Help make sure Stephanie continues this fight in Congress: "" Thanks for everything, Kristen Foca Deputy Campaign Manager Stephanie Schmid for Congress | | | Paid for by Stephanie for New Jersey New Jersey native Stephanie Schmid is running for New Jersey 's 4th Congressional District. Stephanie has a strong record of serving her community, protecting those most vulnerable, and solving difficult public policy problems. She's running to bring new leadership to Congress at a time when we need our leaders to solve pressing challenges and create opportunities for the people of New Jersey. Stephanie is running a grassroots campaign rooted in New Jersey values. She's not accepting any corporate PAC donations or money from special interests.secure.actblue.com/donate/stephanienj-october?refcode=20191017emfooter&amounts=5,10,15,20,25,30,35&amount=5 Stephanie for New Jersey P.O. Box 217 Little Silver, NJ 07739 Emails like this help us stay in touch with you over the course of the campaign. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. You may click here to "" at any time.

name: Cory Booker
subject: I think Rosario reached out, team
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Friend, I want to make sure you saw Rosario's note. After the debate this week, Ro thought it'd be great to give you and a friend the chance to join her in the audience at the next debate in Atlanta -- and then we can all talk about it over a meal the next day. I hope you'll get in on this before it's too late. **[Make a donation today and you'll be automatically entered for the chance to win -- flight, hotel stay, and meal for you and your guest on us.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-contest-cory-and-rosario?refcode=em_fr_20191017_CB_20191017-fr-CB-Rocontest2-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Can't wait to meet you, Cory [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-contest-cory-and-rosario?refcode=em_fr_20191017_CB_20191017-fr-CB-Rocontest2-actives_actives_contribbutton1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") _\---FORWARDED MESSAGE---_ Friend, After watching Cory in the debate last night, I decided I wanted to tell you how proud I am. So I asked the campaign people if I could send you a note and, well, here we are. Cory is kind, thoughtful, brilliant and thinks of everyone else before he thinks of himself. That's why I love him, and that's also why I think he'd make an amazing president. And I think he showed the world that on the debate stage last night. Watching him up there filled me with joy and hope for our country's future. It's a feeling I'll never forget, and one I'd love to invite you to experience with me. **I want you and a friend to come to the November debate in Atlanta with me, and then talk about the night over a meal with Cory and me the next day.[If you chip in any amount, you'll be automatically entered for a chance to win -- the campaign will cover the flight and hotel for you and a guest, and they'll pick up the tab, too.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-contest-cory-and-rosario?refcode=em_fr_20191017_CB_20191017-fr-CB-Rocontest2-actives_actives_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Throughout the last nine months, it's been beautiful to see the possibilities of our country through Cory's eyes. I'm so excited that these debates are giving millions of Americans a chance to get to know the man I love. Hope to see you soon, Rosario [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-contest-cory-and-rosario?refcode=em_fr_20191017_CB_20191017-fr-CB-Rocontest2-actives_actives_contribbutton2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") P.S. Don't worry there will be some non-vegan options, too. **[Enter now!](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-contest-cory-and-rosario?refcode=em_fr_20191017_CB_20191017-fr-CB-Rocontest2-actives_actives_l3&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** _No purchase, payment, or contribution is necessary to enter or win and will not improve chances of winning. Void where prohibited. Entries must be received by November 13, 2019. Enter by contributing[here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0a20/5fca0d19/7692192b/291ff413/4057992136/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-contest-cory-and-rosario") or [click here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0a20/5fca0d19/7692192b/291ff412/4057992136/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://bookerlive.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/Cory-and-Rosario-Contest") to enter without contributing. One (1) winner will receive the following prize package: round-trip tickets for winner and one guest from within the fifty U.S. States, DC, or Puerto Rico to Atlanta, GA; one-night hotel accommodations for winner and one guest; opportunity to have a meal with Senator Booker and Rosario Dawson; opportunity to attend the November DNC Presidential Debate (approx. retail value $3,000). Odds depend on number of entries received. Promotion open only to U.S. citizens, or lawful permanent U.S. residents who are legal residents of 50 United States, District of Columbia and Puerto Rico and 18 or older (or age of majority under applicable law). View full official rules [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0a20/5fca0d19/7692192b/291ff411/4057992136/VEsO/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/cory-rosario-you/"). Sponsor: Cory 2020, PO Box 32009, Newark, NJ 07102._

This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0a20/5fca0d19/7692192b/291ff41f/4057992136/VEsHBQ/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0a20/5fca0d19/7692192b/291ff41e/4057992136/VEsHBA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0a20/5fca0d19/7692192b/291ff41d/4057992136/VEsHBw/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0a20/5fca0d19/7692192b/291ff41c/4057992136/VEsHBg/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").

name: Shannon Salk, Team Hick
subject: What Gardner raised last quarter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
Cory Gardner just released his fundraising report for last quarter-here's what we're up against. | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771488/691c9bd/6fc42f4e/11a791e6/3553713353/VEsH/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-oct?refcode=em_template")
---
| Team,

We just got a look at Cory Gardner's Q3 fundraising report, and I've been poring over the numbers to see exactly what we're up against.

I can tell you right at the top that we've covered a lot of ground this quarter, but Gardner still holds a significant cash advantage. [**_If that 's all you need to hear, chip in today to help close the gap._**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-oct?refcode=em_fr_20191017_SS_20191017-fr-SS-gardnerreport-all_all_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

Gardner's report confirms something we've known all along: **He's banking on support from corporate PACs and big-money special interests to hang on to this seat.**

Let's look at the math. Just 11% of the nearly $2.5 million he raised last quarter came from grassroots donations. That stands in stark contrast to what this team accomplished.

**Since we launched this campaign, 95% of our donations have been under $200, with the average grassroots donation being just $26.**

These numbers prove that this grassroots team can compete. And the momentum is on our side--it took Gardner three months to raise what we nearly did in just five weeks.

That's no small feat, because we're building this the right way. John refuses to accept a single penny of corporate PAC money, which means that this campaign is being powered by everyday Coloradans.

I'm thrilled with this first report, team. We put a huge dent in Cory Gardner's head start. But he still has _$5 million_ in the bank more than we do.

Our job is to close that gap one donation at a time--[**_chip in whatever you can right now:_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-oct?refcode=em_fr_20191017_SS_20191017-fr-SS-gardnerreport-all_all_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=") _If you've saved your information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through right away._ [**_DONATE $5 NOW_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-oct?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=em_fr_20191017_SS_20191017-fr-SS-gardnerreport-all_all_expresslane5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

clean_body: Cory Gardner just released his fundraising report for last quarter-here's what we're up against. | | | "" | Team, We just got a look at Cory Gardner's Q3 fundraising report, and I've been poring over the numbers to see exactly what we're up against. I can tell you right at the top that we've covered a lot of ground this quarter, but Gardner still holds a significant cash advantage. "=" Gardner's report confirms something we've known all along: He's banking on support from corporate PACs and big-money special interests to hang on to this seat. Let's look at the math. Just 11% of the nearly $2.5 million he raised last quarter came from grassroots donations. That stands in stark contrast to what this team accomplished. Since we launched this campaign, 95% of our donations have been under $200, with the average grassroots donation being just $26. These numbers prove that this grassroots team can compete. And the momentum is on our side--it took Gardner three months to raise what we nearly did in just five weeks. That's no small feat, because we're building this the right way. John refuses to accept a single penny of corporate PAC money, which means that this campaign is being powered by everyday Coloradans. I'm thrilled with this first report, team. We put a huge dent in Cory Gardner's head start. But he still has $5 million in the bank more than we do. Our job is to close that gap one donation at a time-- "=" If you've saved your information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through right away. "=" "=" "=" "=" "=" "=" Thank you, Shannon Shannon Salk National Finance Director Hickenlooper for Colorado "=" | | Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado P.O. Box 18886, Denver, CO 80218 Contributions or gifts to Hickenlooper for Colorado are not tax deductible. If you got this message from a friend, you can join the Hickenlooper for Colorado team by "". name: Jen O'Malley Dillon
subject: About to start
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
body:
[1]Beto for America

We’re emailing you from Grand Prairie, Texas.

Beto is getting ready to start the Rally Against Fear and we’re blown away
by how many folks have already shown up to stand together in solidarity
against Donald Trump’s rally in Texas tonight.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/39115?refcode=ema20191017-61957&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1019&akid=61957%2E444211%2EPG_OY4 ]If you’re not able to be with us tonight and want to send your
support, will you chip in $3 and show everyone how united
our movement is?

It would send a huge message to Trump tonight if we can say a wave of
supporters stood with us across the country and donated during the Rally
Against Hate.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/39115?refcode=ema20191017-61957&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=61957%2E444211%2EPG_OY4 ]Contribute $3

Just minutes away from us, Trump is doing whatever he does to prepare for
his trademark rage-filled, deceitful campaign rallies.

Ever since he started running for President, his rallies have given birth
to some of the most divisive and racist rallying calls of his platform.

“Build the wall”

“Send her back”

Referring to Mexicans as “rapists” and “criminals”

Over time, we’ve found that Trump’s rhetoric is more than just hate speech
–– it’s fuel in a rise in violence across our country. Texans know this
too well –– after a gunman killed 22 people in El Paso we soon found out
that his violence was inspired by Trump’s political messages.

That’s why it’s so important to us tonight that we confront Trump’s rally
with our diversity, solidarity, and courage. [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/39115?refcode=ema20191017-61957&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=61957%2E444211%2EPG_OY4 ]Together we will show
Trump that his hate isn’t welcome here or anywhere. Will you please chip
in $3 and help us send that message to Trump?

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/39115?refcode=ema20191017-61957&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=61957%2E444211%2EPG_OY4 ]Contribute $3

Jen O’Malley Dillon
Campaign Manager
Beto for America

Contribute to Beto's campaign: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beto-for-america-emails?refcode=em20191017footer&t=1023&refcode2=61957_444211_PG_OY4&akid=61957%2E444211%2EPG_OY4

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1024&akid=61957%2E444211%2EPG_OY4

PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923

She stayed laser-focused on discussing the problems facing this country and our campaign's vision for big, structural change. Because Elizabeth knows that's how we not only beat Donald Trump in November 2020 -- but also how we level the playing field for working families in January 2021.

**But unfortunately, we fell short of our goal of 7,500 new donors on debate night.**

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Lindsey Graham is like a tenacious little tick, and we need to get him out
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Peter -- South Carolina Senator Lindsey Graham, former Trump critic and current Trump sycophant, has been doing everything he can to cozy up to the White House and suck the blood out of hard-working Americans. He's burrowed himself deep in America's skin and is draining it of energy by defending a criminal president and his corruption. In the Senate, Graham has used his sway with Mitch McConnell to block progressive bills from the House that would actually help people. He has fought against campaign finance reform and the Affordable Care Act, despite their popular support and the actual good they would do for his constituents. He's even defending Trump's trade war with China as his own constituents face layoffs, draining South Carolina for his political benefit. Lindsey the Tick announced this week that he raised a record-breaking $3.29 million in the past three months, giving his campaign a surge of cash as they prepare to not only defend his seat but also defend the GOP Senate majority that allows Graham and co-conspirator Mitch McConnell to hold the country hostage. Jaime Harrison, Graham's Democratic opponent, is making major headway, though, having two back-to-back record-breaking fundraising quarters of his own. We're asking voters what they think about Lindsey Graham and his re-election race, and we need 139 more responses by MIDNIGHT: **Do you support Lindsey Graham?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd8a/6e9863e8/158025b7/1db0f59c/192945544/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/GBYZ8CEa") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd8a/6e9863e8/158025b7/1db0f59c/192945544/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/GBYZ8CEa") Thanks for your support, WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd8a/6e9863e8/158025b7/1db0f5e3/192945544/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-jaime-nd?refcode=OUT20191017c.ND-b&refcode2=8Kj7CTHnGPfHbQEo4W37")

But the only way we’re going to get the chance to save ourselves from another four years of this fever dream is if you help us beat Trump in 2020. body:
| | |
---
| |
---
| | Let me be perfectly blunt with you. I'm fighting for a spot in the next debates, and I might not make it. **Because of the DNC rules, it 's possible for billionaires like Tom Steyer to flood the race with $47M of their own money and buy their way onto that stage. **
**_[I wasn 't born into wealth. You shouldn't have to be born into privilege to become President. And I refuse to take a cent from corporate PACs. It would mean so much to me to have your $5 to make the next debate instead. >>](https://action.julianforthefuture.%3D/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=20191017_em_fr_b3_castro_all_rs&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")_**

Not everyone has the luxury of growing up a frontrunner. But because of your support, I've been able to make each debate stage. But I don't have billions in personal wealth to fund my presidential race. **What I do have is an understanding of what it 's like to struggle -- and a powerful vision to lift up folks struggling across this country.** So I'm calling you to action -- I only need 133 more gifts before midnight to have a historic debate response and show that someone with my background deserves an equal shot at President. Can I count on your immediate $5 to earn my spot at the next debate? | | [**Chip in $5 now >> **](https://action.julianforthefuture.%3D/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=20191017_em_fr_b3_castro_all_rs&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")

If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcf86/3eb3e2fc/546e66c9/744c13b8/2643839549/VEsHBA/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails"). name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: NEW: Syria ceasefire a ‘great day for civilization’
body:
"Last night, President Donald J. Trump sent a delegation of senior American officials—including Vice President Mike Pence, Secretary of State..." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9f68118e94&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • October 17, 2019
---
| | |
# **NEW: Syria ceasefire a ‘great day for civilization’ **

**Last night,** President Donald J. Trump sent a delegation of senior American officials—including Vice President Mike Pence, Secretary of State Mike Pompeo, and National Security Advisor Robert O’Brien—to Ankara to meet with Turkish President Recep Tayyip Erdogan face-to-face.

**And just hours ago,** the Administration was able to deliver a major announcement.

**“Earlier this week,** President Trump took decisive action to call on Turkish forces to stand down, and to end the violence, and to agree to negotiations,” Vice President Pence said during a press conference from Turkey.

** President Trump**: [“Great for everybody. Proud of all!”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=530d227b69&e=3ee4985eea)

**“Today, I'm proud to report—** thanks to the strong leadership of President Donald Trump and the strong relationship between President Erdogan and Turkey and the United States of America—that today the United States and Turkey have agreed to a cease fire in Syria.”

**President Trump’s priorities** are clear: American soldiers can no longer be sacrificed in endless wars across the Middle East. That’s one of the most important promises he made to the American people as a candidate, and he will always honor it.

**Instead of American lives** , the President is using “tough love” to bring other countries to the table and achieve positive outcomes. “Obviously the sanctions and tariffs [on Turkey] were going to be very biting. I’m glad we don't have to do it,” he said.

**The results** of today’s negotiations are important for our partners in Syria:
* Turkey will pause Operation Peace Spring to allow for the withdrawal of mostly Kurdish YPG forces from the 20-mile safe zone for 120 hours

* All military operations under Operation Peace Spring will be paused, and Operation Peace Spring will be halted entirely on completion of the withdrawal

* Turkey agrees to taking no military action against the town of Kobani

* Turkey and the United States mutually commit to stifling any ISIS activities in northeast Syria, which includes coordination on ISIS detention facilities

**“It's a great day** for the United States. It's a great day for Turkey. It's a great day for our partners,” President Trump said. “It's really a great day for civilization.”

**🎬**[No matter what, President Trump will always protect American troops.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0b05d28fa3&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **Louis Vuitton opens new manufacturing plant with President Trump**

**Texas workers** received some welcome news today, as President Trump visited the city of Alvarado to celebrate the opening of a new Louis Vuitton manufacturing plant.

**Louis Vuitton CEO Bernard Arnault** announced that this facility will make leather products with that important label, “Made in USA.”

**The company** plans to invest back in the Texas community, adding 1,000 jobs at the new plant over the next five years. It’s part of Louis Vuitton’s recent commitment under President Trump’s Pledge to America’s Workers, an effort to encourage the private sector to create new training opportunities for workers across our nation.

**With the leadership** of Advisor to the President Ivanka Trump, the Pledge has secured commitments from more than 300 companies and organizations—translating to over 14 million education and training opportunities for students and workers alike.

**In total, the Lone Star State** has added more than 770,000 new jobs since President Trump’s election, and monthly unemployment claims have plummeted by 21.7 percent.

[Learn more about President Trump’s Pledge to America’s Workers. ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=740cee5bf0&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **President Trump honors late Rep. Elijah Cummings**

**Today,** **President Trump** offered his condolences to the family and friends of Rep. Elijah Cummings from Maryland, who passed away early this morning.

**“I got to see** first hand the strength, passion and wisdom of this highly respected political leader,” President Trump said. Cummings represented Baltimore in Congress for more than two decades, and his voice will be difficult—if not impossible—to replace.

**Following the news** , President Trump ordered the U.S. flag to be flown at half-staff today at the White House and at public buildings across the nation.

[Read President Trump’s Proclamation on the death of Elijah E. Cummings.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4e3a0716f0&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|

name: Team Durbin
subject: Senator Durbin is counting on you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
#
Peter -- we're off to an incredible start toward meeting Senator Durbin's fundraising goal. Can he count on your support as he fights to take back the Senate in 2020?
[**Contribute $5 now to help Senator Durbin meet his pivotal fundraising goal.**](https://action.dickdurbin.%3D%3D/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-oct-2019-goal?refcode=em191017&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://action.dickdurbin.%3D%3D/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-oct-2019-goal?refcode=em191017&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
\---Original Message from Senator Dick Durbin---
Peter,
As Mitch McConnell and President Trump use the Senate to enact the extreme GOP agenda, it has never been more clear that we need to take back the Senate in 2020. If we don't, even a Democratic President will face McConnell obstruction.
The path to Democrats winning back the Senate in 2020 runs right through Illinois, which is why it's essential we keep this campaign on track. That's why I'm setting an ambitious fundraising goal--and I need your help to get there, Peter.
**[Will you contribute $5 right now to help me meet my fundraising goal?](https://action.dickdurbin.%3D%3D/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-oct-2019-goal?refcode=em191017&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
Democrats have a vision to move this country forward and repair the damage caused by President Trump's awful policies--but it's going to take all of us standing together to fight back and win both the White House and the Senate in the next election.
We can't do this without you, Peter. That's why I need you.
**[If you're with me in the fight to take back the Senate, I need your help now. Pitch in $5 to help my campaign meet this important fundraising goal.](https://action.dickdurbin.%3D%3D/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-oct-2019-goal?refcode=em191017&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
My best,
Dick Durbin
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://action.dickdurbin.%3D%3D/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-oct-2019-goal?refcode=em191017&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

* * *
Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin

Join Senator Durbin in taking on powerful special interests on behalf of hard-working middle class families by [making a contribution to our campaign here.](https://action.dickdurbin.com/page/m/45ff4c4f/42ab3cf4/61af9be9/135d42a4/504334503/VEsB/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/durbin_footer")
